nodes.lore: Shield made to venerate a maiden whose eyes were crushed by Briars of Sin before being reborn in these lands. Venerating the repose of the soul, this shield boosts focus. The briars can be used to attack foes.

nodes.name: Great Turtle Shell
nodes.snippet: Shield fashioned from a great turtle shell. The natural curve helps it contend with foes' attacks. The turtle is a symbol of tirelessness, and this shield boosts stamina recovery speed.
nodes.lore: Shield fashioned from a great turtle shell. The natural curve helps it contend with foes' attacks. The turtle is a symbol of tirelessness, and this shield boosts stamina recovery speed.

nodes.name: Carian Knight's Shield
nodes.snippet: A teardrop-shaped shield embedded with blue glintstones. Carried by knights who served the Carian royal family. Excels when facing magic or holy attacks. Just who were these knights preparing to fight?
nodes.lore: A teardrop-shaped shield embedded with blue glintstones. Carried by knights who served the Carian royal family. Excels when facing magic or holy attacks. Just who were these knights preparing to fight?

nodes.name: Horse Crest Wooden Shield
nodes.snippet: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle. The circular horsehead design evokes a swift gallop.
nodes.lore: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle. The circular horsehead design evokes a swift gallop.

nodes.name: Candletree Wooden Shield
nodes.snippet: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle. Thought to represent a surreptitious prophecy of cardinal sin, the lit candle-tree design was forbidden.
nodes.lore: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle. Thought to represent a surreptitious prophecy of cardinal sin, the lit candle-tree design was forbidden.

nodes.name: Large Leather Shield
nodes.snippet: A round shield covered in leather. One of the larger categories of medium-sized shield. Though its damage negation may be lacking compared to a metal shield, it can handle wider range of attack affinities.
nodes.lore: A round shield covered in leather. One of the larger categories of medium-sized shield. Though its damage negation may be lacking compared to a metal shield, it can handle wider range of attack affinities.

nodes.name: Flame Crest Wooden Shield
nodes.snippet: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle. Carried by soldiers of the village that is afflicted by frenzy. The yellow flame is the symbol of the affliction, serving as a warning to those who might approach t
nodes.lore: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle. Carried by soldiers of the village that is afflicted by frenzy. The yellow flame is the symbol of the affliction, serving as a warning to those who might approach the village.

nodes.name: Hawk Crest Wooden Shield
nodes.snippet: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle. Adorned with a long-forgotten crest of Stormveil, ancient in design.
nodes.lore: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle. Adorned with a long-forgotten crest of Stormveil, ancient in design.

nodes.name: Beast Crest Heater Shield
nodes.snippet: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield. Features a beast as its crest, serving to remind warriors not to succumb to the arousal of battle. Fight with passion, but become nor its prisoner.
nodes.lore: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield. Features a beast as its crest, serving to remind warriors not to succumb to the arousal of battle. Fight with passion, but become nor its prisoner.

nodes.name: Red Crest Heater Shield
nodes.snippet: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield. The crest symbolizes red wings.
nodes.lore: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield. The crest symbolizes red wings.

nodes.name: Eclipse Crest Heater Shield
nodes.snippet: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield. The sun in eclipse is said to be the symbol of the Wandering Mausoleum where the soulless demigods slumber.
nodes.lore: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield. The sun in eclipse is said to be the symbol of the Wandering Mausoleum where the soulless demigods slumber.

nodes.name: Blue Crest Heater Shield
nodes.snippet: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield. The crest represents a forest and river.
nodes.lore: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield. The crest represents a forest and river.

nodes.name: Inverted Hawk Heater Shield
nodes.snippet: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield. The inverted hawk is the emblem of the company of slaves ordered to explore the Eternal City.
nodes.lore: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield. The inverted hawk is the emblem of the company of slaves ordered to explore the Eternal City.

nodes.name: Heater Shield
nodes.snippet: A medium-sized metal shield, comparatively easy to handle. Metal shields reliably negate physical damage when guarding, a trait which made them highly trusted on the battlefield.
nodes.lore: A medium-sized metal shield, comparatively easy to handle. Metal shields reliably negate physical damage when guarding, a trait which made them highly trusted on the battlefield.

nodes.name: Black Leather Shield
nodes.snippet: Roundshield covered in black leather. On the larger side for a medium-sized shield. From the north, this shield depicts the polar star in rivets of gold. The inside is lined with fur, protecting the carrier from frost.
nodes.lore: Roundshield covered in black leather. On the larger side for a medium-sized shield. From the north, this shield depicts the polar star in rivets of gold. The inside is lined with fur, protecting the carrier from frost.

nodes.name: Dragon Towershield
nodes.snippet: Tower shield engraved with a dragon, symbol of protection. Heavy even among greatshields, it possesses exceptional guarding ability The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall
nodes.lore: Tower shield engraved with a dragon, symbol of protection. Heavy even among greatshields, it possesses exceptional guarding ability The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock.

nodes.name: Crucible Hornshield
nodes.snippet: Greatshield of red-tinged gold carried by Crucible Knights. Features a great horn. An ancient holiness dwells within. The crucible horn skewers foes when performing shield bashes.
nodes.lore: Greatshield of red-tinged gold carried by Crucible Knights. Features a great horn. An ancient holiness dwells within. The crucible horn skewers foes when performing shield bashes.

nodes.name: Distinguished Greatshield
nodes.snippet: Greatshield featuring sumptuous ornamentation used by the scions of great families. Due to their excessive size, these shields were at times seen as the hallmark of little lordlings who were too timid to earn a few nicks and scratches.
nodes.lore: Greatshield featuring sumptuous ornamentation used by the scions of great families. Due to their excessive size, these shields were at times seen as the hallmark of little lordlings who were too timid to earn a few nicks and scratches.

nodes.name: Dragonclaw Shield
nodes.snippet: Greatshield said to have been whittled from the claw of a great, ancient dragon, wielded by grotesque Tree Sentinels who yet serve the Edrtree. Imbued with lightning.
nodes.lore: Greatshield said to have been whittled from the claw of a great, ancient dragon, wielded by grotesque Tree Sentinels who yet serve the Edrtree. Imbued with lightning.

nodes.name: Golden Beast Crest Shield
nodes.snippet: Shield of dull gold with a beast engraved as its crest. Lighter than most greratshields, and subsequently easier to wield. The beast depicted is Serosh, aged counselor who guides the golden lineage.
nodes.lore: Shield of dull gold with a beast engraved as its crest. Lighter than most greratshields, and subsequently easier to wield. The beast depicted is Serosh, aged counselor who guides the golden lineage.

nodes.name: Erdtree Greatshield
nodes.snippet: Weighty greatshield forged of gold carried by the order of Tree Sentinels, heavily equipped knights. Blessed by an old incantation of protection. The living rampart of the Erdtree, the Tree Sentinels are the standard to which all defenders
nodes.lore: Weighty greatshield forged of gold carried by the order of Tree Sentinels, heavily equipped knights. Blessed by an old incantation of protection. The living rampart of the Erdtree, the Tree Sentinels are the standard to which all defenders of the Erdtree aspire.

nodes.name: Briar Greatshield
nodes.snippet: Greatshield from a foreign land, used by Elemer of the Briar. Attacks with this armament utilize the iron thorns that have been wound around its frame. Originates from Eochaid, a land of proudly solitary ascetics.
nodes.lore: Greatshield from a foreign land, used by Elemer of the Briar. Attacks with this armament utilize the iron thorns that have been wound around its frame. Originates from Eochaid, a land of proudly solitary ascetics.

nodes.name: Jellyfish Shield
nodes.snippet: The head of a spirit jellyfish, commonly found floating above sacred ground throughout the Lands Between, wielded without modification as a shield. The see-through head is extremely light, but its flesh is supple, providing absolutely no pr
nodes.lore: The head of a spirit jellyfish, commonly found floating above sacred ground throughout the Lands Between, wielded without modification as a shield. The see-through head is extremely light, but its flesh is supple, providing absolutely no protection from piercing attacks

nodes.name: Fingerprint Stone Shield
nodes.snippet: A great stone shield with an intricately carved fingerprint design. One of the heaviest of all greatshields. Part of the tomb of an ancient god, the Readerless Fingers relayed their message through these imprints, said to be the very seeds
nodes.lore: A great stone shield with an intricately carved fingerprint design. One of the heaviest of all greatshields. Part of the tomb of an ancient god, the Readerless Fingers relayed their message through these imprints, said to be the very seeds from which frenzy first sprouted.

nodes.name: Icon Shield
nodes.snippet: Greatshield painted with a divine scene; the recipients of a blessed tear from the Erdtree. An item that looks back fondly on the age of plenty. The divine scene acts in and of itself as a sacred invocation; gradually restoring the carrier'
nodes.lore: Greatshield painted with a divine scene; the recipients of a blessed tear from the Erdtree. An item that looks back fondly on the age of plenty. The divine scene acts in and of itself as a sacred invocation; gradually restoring the carrier's HP.

nodes.name: Visage Shield
nodes.snippet: Tricksome bronze shield depicting the face of a Fire Giant. Several tongues leap from its open mouth. The dreadful visage and burning flames are designed to remind one of the horror of facing a Fire Giant. In other words, this shield has an
nodes.lore: Tricksome bronze shield depicting the face of a Fire Giant. Several tongues leap from its open mouth. The dreadful visage and burning flames are designed to remind one of the horror of facing a Fire Giant. In other words, this shield has an instructional function.

nodes.name: One-eyed Shield
nodes.snippet: Tricksome shield made from white stone depicting a malformed one-eyed god. The barrel of a firearm pokes through the open mouth. Once worshipped by the giants, this evil deity is believed to have been slain by Queen Marika.
nodes.lore: Tricksome shield made from white stone depicting a malformed one-eyed god. The barrel of a firearm pokes through the open mouth. Once worshipped by the giants, this evil deity is believed to have been slain by Queen Marika.

nodes.name: Spiked Palisade Shield
nodes.snippet: Designed to perform shield bashes, these attacks riddle the enemy with holes, earning it the nickname of "pard shield"
nodes.lore: Designed to perform shield bashes, these attacks riddle the enemy with holes, earning it the nickname of "pard shield"

nodes.name: Manor Towershield
nodes.snippet: An iron greatshield large enough to cover the entire body. Depicts the Roundtable Hold, gathering place of champions. Greatshields boast high damage negation and guard capacity, making enemy attacks easy to repel.
nodes.lore: An iron greatshield large enough to cover the entire body. Depicts the Roundtable Hold, gathering place of champions. Greatshields boast high damage negation and guard capacity, making enemy attacks easy to repel.

nodes.name: Crossed-tree Towershield
nodes.snippet: An iron greatshield large enough to cover the entire body. Emblazoned with an old, interleaving tree. Greatshields boast high damage negation and guard capacity, making enemy attacks easy to repel
nodes.lore: An iron greatshield large enough to cover the entire body. Emblazoned with an old, interleaving tree. Greatshields boast high damage negation and guard capacity, making enemy attacks easy to repel

nodes.name: Redmane Greatshield
nodes.snippet: Greatshield shaped like a fang, featuring the crest of red-maned lion. Carried by the Redmane Knights who fought alongside Radahn.
nodes.lore: Greatshield shaped like a fang, featuring the crest of red-maned lion. Carried by the Redmane Knights who fought alongside Radahn.

nodes.name: Ant's Skull Plate
nodes.snippet: Huge head of one of the giant ants which inhabit the two underground rivers, used without modification as a shield. Excels at repeling enemy attacks. Giant ants are venomous creatures, granting a boost to immunity when wielding the shield.
nodes.lore: Huge head of one of the giant ants which inhabit the two underground rivers, used without modification as a shield. Excels at repeling enemy attacks. Giant ants are venomous creatures, granting a boost to immunity when wielding the shield.

nodes.name: Inverted Hawk Towershield
nodes.snippet: An iron greatshield large enough to cover the entire body. Features an inverted hawk crest. Greatshields boast high damage negation and guard capacity, making enemy attacks easy to repel.
nodes.lore: An iron greatshield large enough to cover the entire body. Features an inverted hawk crest. Greatshields boast high damage negation and guard capacity, making enemy attacks easy to repel.

nodes.name: Eclipse Crest Greatshield
nodes.snippet: Metal greatshield painted with a sun in eclipse. Carried by the headless mausoleum knights. The eclipsed sun, drained of color, is the protective star of soulless demigods. It aids the mausoleum knights by keeping Destined Death at bay. No
nodes.lore: Metal greatshield painted with a sun in eclipse. Carried by the headless mausoleum knights. The eclipsed sun, drained of color, is the protective star of soulless demigods. It aids the mausoleum knights by keeping Destined Death at bay. No skill. This armament has no skill. If the armament in the other hand has a skill, that skill will be used instead.

nodes.name: Cuckoo Greatshield
nodes.snippet: Metal Greatshield painted with a peering cuckoo. Carried by the enchanted knights sworn to the academy. Boasting high magic damage negation, this shield is used to hunt down mages. Our Enemys is none other then caria itself
nodes.lore: Metal Greatshield painted with a peering cuckoo. Carried by the enchanted knights sworn to the academy. Boasting high magic damage negation, this shield is used to hunt down mages. Our Enemys is none other then caria itself

nodes.name: Gilded Greatshield
nodes.snippet: Metal greatshield coated with gold. Carried by knights loyal to Godrick. The red tinge in the gold coat mirrors the primordial matter that became the Erdtree. The color of homeward yearning.
nodes.lore: Metal greatshield coated with gold. Carried by knights loyal to Godrick. The red tinge in the gold coat mirrors the primordial matter that became the Erdtree. The color of homeward yearning.

nodes.name: Golden Greatshield
nodes.snippet: Oval greatshield made of gold, carried by knights who protect the Royal Capital of Leyndell. Knights of Leyndell are reputed for their sturdiness, exemplified by this shield's exceptional guard capacity.
nodes.lore: Oval greatshield made of gold, carried by knights who protect the Royal Capital of Leyndell. Knights of Leyndell are reputed for their sturdiness, exemplified by this shield's exceptional guard capacity.

nodes.name: Haligtree Crest Greatshield
nodes.snippet: Metal greatshield depicting the Haligtree with unalloyed gold. Carried by knights who have vowed to serve Miquella's Haligtree. Possesses high holy damage negation. Yet now, with the Haligtree misshapen, this wondrous rendition is a fleetin
nodes.lore: Metal greatshield depicting the Haligtree with unalloyed gold. Carried by knights who have vowed to serve Miquella's Haligtree. Possesses high holy damage negation. Yet now, with the Haligtree misshapen, this wondrous rendition is a fleeting fantasy.

nodes.name: Wooden Greatshield
nodes.snippet: Wooden greatshield reinforced with a metal ornamentation. Greatshields boast high damage negation and guard capacity, making enemy attacks easy to repel.
nodes.lore: Wooden greatshield reinforced with a metal ornamentation. Greatshields boast high damage negation and guard capacity, making enemy attacks easy to repel.

nodes.name: Lordsworn's Shield
nodes.snippet: Wooden tower shield. Lightweightfor a greatshield and easy to handle. Commonly used in the Shattering. Greatshields boast high damage negation and guard capacity, making enemy attacks easy to repel.
nodes.lore: Wooden tower shield. Lightweightfor a greatshield and easy to handle. Commonly used in the Shattering. Greatshields boast high damage negation and guard capacity, making enemy attacks easy to repel.

nodes.name: Briars Of Punishment
nodes.snippet: An aberrant sorcery discovered by exiled criminals. Theirs are the sorceries most reviled by the academy. Wounds the caster with thorns of sin, sending a trail of bloodthorns running over the ground to impale enemies from below. This sorcer
nodes.lore: An aberrant sorcery discovered by exiled criminals. Theirs are the sorceries most reviled by the academy. Wounds the caster with thorns of sin, sending a trail of bloodthorns running over the ground to impale enemies from below. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. The guilty, their eyes gouged by thorns, lived in eternal darkness. There, they discovered the blood star.

nodes.name: Ancient Death Rancor
nodes.snippet: Sorcery of the servants of Death.
nodes.lore: Sorcery of the servants of Death.

nodes.name: Briars Of Sin
nodes.snippet: An aberrant sorcery, discovered along with red glintstone by those exiled to the north for their crimes. Summons large thorns from a whorl of blood shed by one's own hand in penance for sins. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. The Academy
nodes.lore: An aberrant sorcery, discovered along with red glintstone by those exiled to the north for their crimes. Summons large thorns from a whorl of blood shed by one's own hand in penance for sins. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. The Academy reviles this sorcery, which draws its power from faith.

nodes.name: Cannon Of Haima
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Lobs an explosive magic projectile that flies in an arc. Charging enhances potency. Drawn from the conspectus of Haima, the adjudicator of the academy, this sorcery employs mig
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Lobs an explosive magic projectile that flies in an arc. Charging enhances potency. Drawn from the conspectus of Haima, the adjudicator of the academy, this sorcery employs might as a means to quell conflict.

nodes.name: Ambush Shard
nodes.snippet: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery. Launches a projectile from a distance removed from the caster, so as to strike the enemy from behind. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. The Sellian sorcerers were assassins, and it i
nodes.lore: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery. Launches a projectile from a distance removed from the caster, so as to strike the enemy from behind. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. The Sellian sorcerers were assassins, and it is said that they often hunted their fellows.

nodes.name: Carian Phalanx
nodes.snippet: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
nodes.lore: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.

nodes.name: Adula's Moonblade
nodes.snippet: Sorcery of Adula, the Glintstone Dragon. Conjures a cold magic greatsword, then delivers a sweeping blow that launches a blade-like projectile of frost. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. Adula, a devourer of sorcerers, was bested by Rann
nodes.lore: Sorcery of Adula, the Glintstone Dragon. Conjures a cold magic greatsword, then delivers a sweeping blow that launches a blade-like projectile of frost. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. Adula, a devourer of sorcerers, was bested by Ranni and subsequently swore a knightly oath to her Dark Moon.

nodes.name: Carian Greatsword
nodes.snippet: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family. Conjures a magic greatsword and then delivers a sweeping blow. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. Armed with this spell, sorcerers gain the strength of knights, their loyalty sworn to the m
nodes.lore: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family. Conjures a magic greatsword and then delivers a sweeping blow. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. Armed with this spell, sorcerers gain the strength of knights, their loyalty sworn to the moon.

nodes.name: Carian Piercer
nodes.snippet: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
nodes.lore: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.

nodes.name: Carian Retaliation
nodes.snippet: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
nodes.lore: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.

nodes.name: Carian Slicer
nodes.snippet: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
nodes.lore: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.

nodes.name: Crystal Barrage
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.

nodes.name: Collapsing Stars
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries that manipulates gravitational forces.
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries that manipulates gravitational forces.

nodes.name: Comet Azur
nodes.snippet: Legendary sorcery devised by Azur, primeval sorcerer. Fires a tremendous comet in a torrent akin to the distant starry expanse, the place said to be the origin of glintstone. Hold to continue releasing the sorcery's power. When Azur glimpse
nodes.lore: Legendary sorcery devised by Azur, primeval sorcerer. Fires a tremendous comet in a torrent akin to the distant starry expanse, the place said to be the origin of glintstone. Hold to continue releasing the sorcery's power. When Azur glimpsed into the primeval current, he saw darkness. He was left both bewitched and fearful of the abyss.

nodes.name: Crystal Burst
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires a burst of glintstone crystal shards. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging increases potency. A sorcery of the Crystal Cadre, a group of sorc
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires a burst of glintstone crystal shards. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging increases potency. A sorcery of the Crystal Cadre, a group of sorcerers who pursued the wisdom of stone - the secrets locked in the faint cogitation of the Crystalians.

nodes.name: Comet
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires a great magical comet. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging enhances potency. The greatest of the Karolos Conspectus's sorceries, that only a
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires a great magical comet. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging enhances potency. The greatest of the Karolos Conspectus's sorceries, that only a very few sorcerers have ever mastered.

nodes.name: Crystal Torrent
nodes.snippet: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians.
nodes.lore: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians.

nodes.name: Crystal Release
nodes.snippet: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians. Creates a mass of crystal, then shatters it to scour a wide area with a violent rain of crystal shards. This sorcery is used by high-ranking adepts among the Crystalians. Some also call this sorcery "t
nodes.lore: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians. Creates a mass of crystal, then shatters it to scour a wide area with a violent rain of crystal shards. This sorcery is used by high-ranking adepts among the Crystalians. Some also call this sorcery "the Crystal Sun."

nodes.name: Fia's Mist
nodes.snippet: Sorcery of Fia, the Deathbed Companion. Creates a deathly mist before the caster, which inflicts Death blight upon those who enter. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. Charging enhances range of the mist. This sorcery was developed to
nodes.lore: Sorcery of Fia, the Deathbed Companion. Creates a deathly mist before the caster, which inflicts Death blight upon those who enter. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. Charging enhances range of the mist. This sorcery was developed to oppose the Roundtable Hold, and is effective only against the Tarnished.

nodes.name: Eternal Darkness
nodes.snippet: Forbidden sorcery of Sellia, Town of Sorcery.
nodes.lore: Forbidden sorcery of Sellia, Town of Sorcery.

nodes.name: Frozen Armament
nodes.snippet: Sorcery said to have been used by the old snow witch. Enchants armament held in the right hand with frost. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. The snowy crone taught the young Ranni to fear the dark moon as she imparted her cold sorce
nodes.lore: Sorcery said to have been used by the old snow witch. Enchants armament held in the right hand with frost. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. The snowy crone taught the young Ranni to fear the dark moon as she imparted her cold sorcery.

nodes.name: Founding Rain Of Stars
nodes.snippet: The eldest primeval sorcery, said to have been discovered by an
nodes.lore: The eldest primeval sorcery, said to have been discovered by an

nodes.snippet: Sorcery of the servants of Death.
nodes.lore: Sorcery of the servants of Death.

nodes.snippet: Sorcery said to have been used by the old snow witch.
nodes.lore: Sorcery said to have been used by the old snow witch.

nodes.name: Gelmir's Fury
nodes.snippet: One of the sorceries developed from the magma of Mt. Gelmir.
nodes.lore: One of the sorceries developed from the magma of Mt. Gelmir.

nodes.name: Gavel Of Haima
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Creates a magical greathammer and slams it down. Allows one follow-up attack. Drawn from the scholarly conspectus of Haima, the adjudicator of the academy, this sorcery employs
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Creates a magical greathammer and slams it down. Allows one follow-up attack. Drawn from the scholarly conspectus of Haima, the adjudicator of the academy, this sorcery employs might as a means to quell conflict.

nodes.name: Glintstone Arc
nodes.snippet: Fires a horizontal arc of magic that spreads outward. This sorcery can be cast repeteadly and while in motion.
nodes.lore: Fires a horizontal arc of magic that spreads outward. This sorcery can be cast repeteadly and while in motion.

nodes.name: Glintstone Cometshard
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires a magical comet with a trailing tail. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging enhances potency. A sorcery of the Karolos Conspectus, the most ve
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires a magical comet with a trailing tail. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging enhances potency. A sorcery of the Karolos Conspectus, the most venerable of the academy.

nodes.name: Glintstone Pebble
nodes.snippet: The most basic glintstone sorcery of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
nodes.lore: The most basic glintstone sorcery of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.

nodes.name: Glintstone Stars
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.

nodes.snippet: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
nodes.lore: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.

nodes.name: Gravity Well
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries that manipulates gravitational forces. Fires a projectile of condensed gravitational force. Those struck by it will be pulled toward the caster. Charging enhances potency. A gravitational technique studied by
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries that manipulates gravitational forces. Fires a projectile of condensed gravitational force. Those struck by it will be pulled toward the caster. Charging enhances potency. A gravitational technique studied by the young Radahn. His master was an Alabaster Lord with skin of stone.

nodes.name: Great Glintstone Shard
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. The glintstone serves as a conduit, launching large magical projectiles at foes. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Those unworthy of the stone crown typi
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. The glintstone serves as a conduit, launching large magical projectiles at foes. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Those unworthy of the stone crown typically end their brief journey into sorcery here.

nodes.name: Lucidity
nodes.snippet: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
nodes.lore: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.

nodes.name: Greatblade Phalanx
nodes.snippet: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family. Creates a defensive arch of larger magic glintblades overhead, which automatically attack nearby foes. Used by the enchanted troll knights. They were the comrades of the young Rennala, bound
nodes.lore: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family. Creates a defensive arch of larger magic glintblades overhead, which automatically attack nearby foes. Used by the enchanted troll knights. They were the comrades of the young Rennala, bound by oath.

nodes.name: Great Oracular Bubble
nodes.snippet: Sorcery of the claymen who served as priests in the ancient

nodes.lore: Sorcery used by Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree. Creates a magic greatbow and fires four great arrows simultaneously. Charging enhances potency. Hold to keep the great arrows nocked. Developed by Loretta after her long, bloody journey to seek out a place where the Albinaurics could live in peace.

nodes.lore: A glintstone sorcery that draws on gravitational force, used by a great white king with stone skin. Calls small meteorites down from the sky. The meteor shower continues for as long as the sorcery is in effect. It is said that, in the Eternal City, now lost in ruin underground, meteorites held the same import as stars.

nodes.name: Rennala's Full Moon
nodes.snippet: Sorcery associated with the Carian queen. Uses the caster as a vessel to incarnate a full moon, then sends it floating toward foes. The full moon dispels all sorcery that touches it, and temporarily reduces magic damage negation for those i
nodes.lore: Sorcery associated with the Carian queen. Uses the caster as a vessel to incarnate a full moon, then sends it floating toward foes. The full moon dispels all sorcery that touches it, and temporarily reduces magic damage negation for those it strikes. Queen Rennala encountered this enchanting moon when she was young, and later, it would bewitch the academy.

nodes.lore: One of the sorceries developed from the magma of Mt. Gelmir. Fires a lump of condensed magma that explodes a short delay after hitting the target. Charging enhances potency and further delays the explosion. After discovering the ancient hexes of Gelmir, Rykard, son of Queen Rennala, brought them back into practical use as new forms of sorcery.

nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Imbues the ferrule of the caster's staff with magic, then thrusts it into the ground to create a magical shockwave. Allows one follow-up attack. A Stonedigger sorcery used by the glintstone miners of the crystal tunnel. At the academy, use of this sorcery was a stigma that marked out failed scholars.

nodes.name: Shattering Crystal
nodes.snippet: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians. Creates a mass of crystal, then shatters it in a forward burst. Charging enhances potency. The Crystalians are inorganic beings, yet they live. They cleave close to the ideals of the primeval current,
nodes.lore: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians. Creates a mass of crystal, then shatters it in a forward burst. Charging enhances potency. The Crystalians are inorganic beings, yet they live. They cleave close to the ideals of the primeval current, and as such, they are revered guests of the sorcerers.

nodes.name: Swift Glintstone Shard
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. The glintstone serves as a conduit, launching swift magical projectiles at foes. This sorcery can be used without delay after performing another action. Those unworthy of the s
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. The glintstone serves as a conduit, launching swift magical projectiles at foes. This sorcery can be used without delay after performing another action. Those unworthy of the stone crown typically end their brief journey into sorcery here.

nodes.name: Terra Magicus
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Draws an academy sigil upon the ground, raising the magic strength of those within. Once, the sigil would be cast from the highest belfry of the academy, covering the entire in
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Draws an academy sigil upon the ground, raising the magic strength of those within. Once, the sigil would be cast from the highest belfry of the academy, covering the entire institution's grounds. This spell allows such vivid experience of spell—casting success, it turns many a fledgling into a true sorcerer in a flash of newfound understanding.

nodes.name: Unseen Blade
nodes.snippet: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery. Enchants armament held in right hand, making it completely invisible. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. Used by Sellian assassins to present themselves as unarmed sorcerers.
nodes.lore: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery. Enchants armament held in right hand, making it completely invisible. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. Used by Sellian assassins to present themselves as unarmed sorcerers.

nodes.name: Unseen Form
nodes.snippet: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery. Makes the caster semi-invisible. While on horseback, effect extends to cover the mount. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. The Sellian assassins considered every option that aide
nodes.lore: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery. Makes the caster semi-invisible. While on horseback, effect extends to cover the mount. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. The Sellian assassins considered every option that aided their dirty work.

nodes.lore: This legendary incantation is one of several that draws directly from the power of the Fire Giants. Releases a ball of raging fire said to be inhabited by a fell god. The fireball floats toward enemies and explodes, setting the area ablaze. Arghanthy, the chief guardian of the Flame, had kept this incantation a well-kept secret until it was stolen by Adan. The fell god still lurks within the Fire Giants.

nodes.lore: Incantation that channels the power of the Dragonkin Soldiers. Creates a spear of ice lightning and stabs it into the ground from above. On impact, the spear will burst into trails of lightning advancing forwards. The Dragonkin were born in the Eternal City, where they knew no true sky, nor true lightning. Instead, ice lightning was their weapon.

nodes.lore: One of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Summons a lightning spear and hurls it before the caster. Charging causes a lightning bolt to strike the point ofimpact. Long ago, Godwyn the Golden defeated the ancient dragon Fortissax, and befriended his fallen foe — an event that gave rise to the ancient dragon cult in the capital.

nodes.lore: Incantation of the Golden Order fundamentalists. One of the key fundamentals. Heals all negative statuses, dispels special effects, and reveals mimicry in all its forms. The fundamentalists describe the Golden Order through the powers of regression and causality. Regression is the pull of meaning; that all things yearn eternally to converge.

nodes.lore: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Used by hunters of Those Who Live in Death. Enchants armament held in the right hand with holy-affinity attacks. This incantation is especially damaging to Those Who Live in Death. Any felled by this incantation cannot be revived. The role of the hunters is to stamp out defiled reason - all for the perfection of the Golden Order.

nodes.name: Magic Fortification
nodes.snippet: Incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Increases magic damage negation. This incantation can be cast while in motion. Follow the path that has been set for you, and you will make enemies of all others: the monks, the sorcerers, the ancie
nodes.lore: Incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Increases magic damage negation. This incantation can be cast while in motion. Follow the path that has been set for you, and you will make enemies of all others: the monks, the sorcerers, the ancient dragon knights, and the scions of gold. Heed me – the Lands Between offers no welcome to the Tarnished.

nodes.lore: A superior incantation of Erdtree Worship. Increase damage negation for all affinities except physical, for both the caster and nearby allies. Hold to continue praying and delay activation. In the beginning, everything was in opposition to the Erdtree. But through countless victories in war, it became the embodiment of Order.

nodes.name: Poison Armament
nodes.snippet: Incantation of the servants of rot. Enchants armament held in the right hand with poison. This incantation can be cast while in motion. Those who dwell within poison know rot all too well. The death that begets life, that comes to all equal
nodes.lore: Incantation of the servants of rot. Enchants armament held in the right hand with poison. This incantation can be cast while in motion. Those who dwell within poison know rot all too well. The death that begets life, that comes to all equally. That is to say: it is the cycle of rebirth put into practice.

nodes.name: Scouring Black Flame
nodes.snippet: A black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles. Sweeps a wide area before the caster with black flame. Charging enhances range. The black flame could once slay gods. But when Maliketh sealed Destined Death, the true power of the black fl
nodes.lore: A black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles. Sweeps a wide area before the caster with black flame. Charging enhances range. The black flame could once slay gods. But when Maliketh sealed Destined Death, the true power of the black flame was lost.

nodes.snippet: Technique of Malenia, the Goddess of Rot.

nodes.name: Swarm Of Flies
nodes.snippet: A Blood Oath incantation, shared from the Lord of Blood's power. Releases a swarm of bloodflies before the caster to assault foes. The vile swarm deals damage and builds up onset of blood loss. This incantation can be cast while in motion.
nodes.lore: A Blood Oath incantation, shared from the Lord of Blood's power. Releases a swarm of bloodflies before the caster to assault foes. The vile swarm deals damage and builds up onset of blood loss. This incantation can be cast while in motion. The new palace of the Lord of Blood lies in a swamp of festering blood, and these flies are said to spawn from excrement in that land.

nodes.name: Theodorix's Magma
nodes.snippet: Superior incantation of Dragon Communion. Channels the power of the great wyrm Theodorix. Transforms caster into a great wyrm to spew a large volume of magma breath. Allows one follow-up attack. The name of the ancient troll warrior Theodor
nodes.lore: Superior incantation of Dragon Communion. Channels the power of the great wyrm Theodorix. Transforms caster into a great wyrm to spew a large volume of magma breath. Allows one follow-up attack. The name of the ancient troll warrior Theodorix lives on — as a hero of the War against the Giants.

nodes.name: Unendurable Frenzy
nodes.snippet: Incantation originating from the maddening Three Fingers. Causes the yellow flame of frenzy to violently burst forth from the caster's eyes. Hold to continue channeling the flame. This incantation can be used while in motion. It is the madd
nodes.lore: Incantation originating from the maddening Three Fingers. Causes the yellow flame of frenzy to violently burst forth from the caster's eyes. Hold to continue channeling the flame. This incantation can be used while in motion. It is the maddening pain and unstoppable tears of those afflicted with the flame of frenzy brought into being.

nodes.name: Triple Rings Of Light
nodes.snippet: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Produces three rings of light and fires them forwards. The rings of light return to a position close to the caster before disappearing. This incantation can be cast repeatedly. A
nodes.lore: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Produces three rings of light and fires them forwards. The rings of light return to a position close to the caster before disappearing. This incantation can be cast repeatedly. A gift from the young Ivliquella to his father, Radagon.

nodes.lore: Superior Erdtree Worship incantation. Produces a golden shockwave that knocks back nearby foes. Charging increases the size of the shockwave. This incantation was discovered when the Elden Ring was shattered, and it was feared as a sign of the Erdtree's wrath.

nodes.name: Lost Ashes Of War
nodes.snippet: Empty ashes of war, devoid of any memories of battle.Unable to apply any kind of affinity in their current state, but can be used by Smithing Master Hewg of the Roundtable Hold to recreate other ashes.Thus does the copy pass into becoming t
nodes.lore: Empty ashes of war, devoid of any memories of battle.Unable to apply any kind of affinity in their current state, but can be used by Smithing Master Hewg of the Roundtable Hold to recreate other ashes.Thus does the copy pass into becoming the genuine article.

nodes.snippet: Silver armor engraved with tiny beasts. Worn by Bernahl the Recusant. Beasts are drawn to champions, and to lords. And this armor befits a champion worthy of becoming a lord. And that is what Bernahl was. Until his maiden threw herself into
nodes.lore: Silver armor engraved with tiny beasts. Worn by Bernahl the Recusant. Beasts are drawn to champions, and to lords. And this armor befits a champion worthy of becoming a lord. And that is what Bernahl was. Until his maiden threw herself into the fire.

nodes.name: Black Knife Armor
nodes.snippet: Scale armor used by the Black Knife Assassins, forged to make no sound. Traces of power yet remain in its concealing veil, which muffles the sound of footsteps. The assassins that carried out the deeds of the Night of the Black Knives were
nodes.lore: Scale armor used by the Black Knife Assassins, forged to make no sound. Traces of power yet remain in its concealing veil, which muffles the sound of footsteps. The assassins that carried out the deeds of the Night of the Black Knives were all women, and rumored to be Numen who had close ties with Marika herself.

nodes.name: Beast Champion Armor (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Best Champion Armor
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Best Champion Armor

nodes.name: Banished Knight Armor
nodes.snippet: Thick, full set of armor covering the entire body. This armor was worn by knights who, whether by misfortune or misdeed, were forced to abandon their homes. These fierce warriors were each and all accomplished. Perhaps that is why, despite
nodes.lore: Thick, full set of armor covering the entire body. This armor was worn by knights who, whether by misfortune or misdeed, were forced to abandon their homes. These fierce warriors were each and all accomplished. Perhaps that is why, despite their territorial losses, they were still named knights.

nodes.name: Bloodsoaked Tabard
nodes.snippet: Padded cloth armor with indelible bloodstains around the neck. Worn by headless foot soldiers who endlessly guard the Wandering Mausoleum.
nodes.lore: Padded cloth armor with indelible bloodstains around the neck. Worn by headless foot soldiers who endlessly guard the Wandering Mausoleum.

nodes.name: Blue Festive Garb
nodes.snippet: Ceremonial garb worn by dancers at the festivities in Dominula, the village of windmills. Use of this garb, dyed in a stunning blue, is only permitted for the young maids who play the central role in the festival.
nodes.lore: Ceremonial garb worn by dancers at the festivities in Dominula, the village of windmills. Use of this garb, dyed in a stunning blue, is only permitted for the young maids who play the central role in the festival.

nodes.name: Blue Cloth Vest
nodes.snippet: Vest of a nomadic warrior. The blue color of its fabric symbolizes brisk waters, as fluid and flowing as the sword in the hand of its wearer. Just as still waters turn foul, stagnation leads to decay. Warriors must remain ever drifting.
nodes.lore: Vest of a nomadic warrior. The blue color of its fabric symbolizes brisk waters, as fluid and flowing as the sword in the hand of its wearer. Just as still waters turn foul, stagnation leads to decay. Warriors must remain ever drifting.

nodes.name: Blue Silver Mail Armor
nodes.snippet: Chainmail armor crafted with blue silver. Worn by the wolf-riding Albinauric archers. Blue silver is a metal born from the same mother as the archers themselves, and provides protection from magic and frost.
nodes.lore: Chainmail armor crafted with blue silver. Worn by the wolf-riding Albinauric archers. Blue silver is a metal born from the same mother as the archers themselves, and provides protection from magic and frost.

nodes.name: Brave's Battlewear
nodes.snippet: Battlewear fashioned from leather armor adorned with a large sheet of cloth. Garb worn by warriors of the frigid uplands The red cloth signifies participation in the Long March long, long ago and this ceremonial garb beseeches the favor of
nodes.lore: Battlewear fashioned from leather armor adorned with a large sheet of cloth. Garb worn by warriors of the frigid uplands The red cloth signifies participation in the Long March long, long ago and this ceremonial garb beseeches the favor of the Warrior King who led them.

nodes.name: Briar Armor (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Briar Armor
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Briar Armor

nodes.name: Carian Knight Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor of the enchanted knights that once served the Carian royal family. The enchanted knights, anointed by the Lunar Queen, were heroes of the highest honors, but fell into disarray with the decline of the royal family.
nodes.lore: Armor of the enchanted knights that once served the Carian royal family. The enchanted knights, anointed by the Lunar Queen, were heroes of the highest honors, but fell into disarray with the decline of the royal family.

nodes.name: Briar Armor
nodes.snippet: Battered iron armor from a foreign land. Worn by Elemer of the Briar.
nodes.lore: Battered iron armor from a foreign land. Worn by Elemer of the Briar.

nodes.name: Chain Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor made of woven chain. Standard issue for ordinary soldiers. Though plain in appearance, it offers dependable protection.
nodes.lore: Armor made of woven chain. Standard issue for ordinary soldiers. Though plain in appearance, it offers dependable protection.

nodes.name: Champion Pauldron
nodes.snippet: Pauldron reserved for the badlands' bravest. Proof that the wearer has slaughtered countless foes. Following the example of their chieftain Hoarah Loux, the brave warriors of the badlands shun excess adornment.
nodes.lore: Pauldron reserved for the badlands' bravest. Proof that the wearer has slaughtered countless foes. Following the example of their chieftain Hoarah Loux, the brave warriors of the badlands shun excess adornment.

nodes.name: Bull-goat Armor
nodes.snippet: Great Horned Tragoth's armor. Covers its wearer with a pair of giant horns, providing staunch poise.
nodes.lore: Great Horned Tragoth's armor. Covers its wearer with a pair of giant horns, providing staunch poise.

nodes.name: Chain-draped Tabard
nodes.snippet: Padded cloth armor with a chainmail shawl draped over the shoulders. Widely issued to foot soldiers in a lord's army.
nodes.lore: Padded cloth armor with a chainmail shawl draped over the shoulders. Widely issued to foot soldiers in a lord's army.

nodes.name: Cloth Garb
nodes.snippet: Clothing made of coarse material, commonly worn in the Lands Between.
nodes.lore: Clothing made of coarse material, commonly worn in the Lands Between.

nodes.name: Cleanrot Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor of the Cleanrot Knights, celebrated for their undefeated campaign in the Shattering. The Cleanrot Knights vowed to fight alongside Malenia, despite the inevitable, if gradual, putrefaction of their flesh. Their acceptance of their fat
nodes.lore: Armor of the Cleanrot Knights, celebrated for their undefeated campaign in the Shattering. The Cleanrot Knights vowed to fight alongside Malenia, despite the inevitable, if gradual, putrefaction of their flesh. Their acceptance of their fate made these battles fiercest of all.

nodes.name: Commoner's Garb
nodes.snippet: Garb with a thick embroidered cape attached. Standard wear for commoners of the Lands Between.
nodes.lore: Garb with a thick embroidered cape attached. Standard wear for commoners of the Lands Between.

nodes.name: Confessor Armor (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Confessor Armor
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Confessor Armor

nodes.name: Confessor Armor
nodes.snippet: Black leather armor for blending in with the darkness. Worn by church confessors. The churches outside the Lands Between, dedicated to the teachings of the Two Fingers, send confessors out to follow the guidance of grace. The confessors are
nodes.lore: Black leather armor for blending in with the darkness. Worn by church confessors. The churches outside the Lands Between, dedicated to the teachings of the Two Fingers, send confessors out to follow the guidance of grace. The confessors are loyal servants to the Two Fingers, ready to hunt down and quietly dispose of their enemies.

nodes.name: Commoner's Simple Garb
nodes.snippet: Garb with a modest cloth cape attached. Standard wear for commoners of the Lands Between. The board hung from the neck depicts a sprawling tree, its roots and branches forming two holes. This is a self-imposed shackle, a voluntary display o
nodes.lore: Garb with a modest cloth cape attached. Standard wear for commoners of the Lands Between. The board hung from the neck depicts a sprawling tree, its roots and branches forming two holes. This is a self-imposed shackle, a voluntary display of allegiance to the Erdtree that increases faith.

nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Commoner's Simple Garb

nodes.name: Consort's Robe
nodes.snippet: Fine robe of white silk worn by Tanith, Lady of the Volcano Manor.
nodes.lore: Fine robe of white silk worn by Tanith, Lady of the Volcano Manor.

nodes.name: Crucible Axe Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor of the Crucible Knights who served Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. Worn by the knight Ordovis and his men. Holds the power of the crucible of life, the primordial form of the Erdtree. Strengthens Aspects of the Crucible incantations.
nodes.lore: Armor of the Crucible Knights who served Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. Worn by the knight Ordovis and his men. Holds the power of the crucible of life, the primordial form of the Erdtree. Strengthens Aspects of the Crucible incantations.

nodes.name: Corhyn's Robe
nodes.snippet: Robe of Corhyn the cleric. Even after exile, Corhyn refused to recant his prophecies. And for this, he was blessed with the guidance of grace. Since then, the cart wheel draped on his neck has served as a reminder. That true guidance awaits
nodes.lore: Robe of Corhyn the cleric. Even after exile, Corhyn refused to recant his prophecies. And for this, he was blessed with the guidance of grace. Since then, the cart wheel draped on his neck has served as a reminder. That true guidance awaits those with iron wills. Those with unwavering faith.

nodes.name: Crucible Tree Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor of the Crucible Knights who served Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. Worn by the knight Siluria and her men. Holds the power of the crucible of life, the primordial form of the Erdtree. Strengthens Aspects of the Crucible incantations.
nodes.lore: Armor of the Crucible Knights who served Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. Worn by the knight Siluria and her men. Holds the power of the crucible of life, the primordial form of the Erdtree. Strengthens Aspects of the Crucible incantations.

nodes.name: Cuckoo Surcoat
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by Raya Lucaria Academy soldiers. The surcoat depicts twinned cuckoos peering into a flourishing mass of glintstone. To a glintstone sorcerer, the body is a transient thing. The Cuckoo alone knows its insignificance, yet watches
nodes.lore: Armor worn by Raya Lucaria Academy soldiers. The surcoat depicts twinned cuckoos peering into a flourishing mass of glintstone. To a glintstone sorcerer, the body is a transient thing. The Cuckoo alone knows its insignificance, yet watches over it all the same.

nodes.snippet: Armor worn by Raya Lucaria Academy knights.

nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Cuckoo Knight Armor

nodes.name: Deathbed Dress
nodes.snippet: Extremely thin and sheer white dress worn by the Deathbed Companion as she embraces the dead. Slowly replenishes the HP of nearby allies, but not that of the wearer. The touch of the fabric is exceedingly soft, so as not to harm even the mo
nodes.lore: Extremely thin and sheer white dress worn by the Deathbed Companion as she embraces the dead. Slowly replenishes the HP of nearby allies, but not that of the wearer. The touch of the fabric is exceedingly soft, so as not to harm even the most withered corpse, while still sharing her warmth.

nodes.name: Depraved Perfumer Robe
nodes.snippet: Robe worn by depraved perfumers. The embroidery on the apron is itself a curse upon the Erdtree. These heresy-inclined perfumers imbibe their own spices to alter body and mind. Their slow descent into self-destruction is what earned them th
nodes.lore: Robe worn by depraved perfumers. The embroidery on the apron is itself a curse upon the Erdtree. These heresy-inclined perfumers imbibe their own spices to alter body and mind. Their slow descent into self-destruction is what earned them their name.

nodes.name: Drake Knight Armor
nodes.snippet: Black iron armor worn by drake knights. Features the spoils of a dragon catch as an emblem of pride as both dragon hunter and partake of communion. The cape is crafted with dragon wing membrane.
nodes.lore: Black iron armor worn by drake knights. Features the spoils of a dragon catch as an emblem of pride as both dragon hunter and partake of communion. The cape is crafted with dragon wing membrane.

nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Elden Lord Armor

nodes.name: Elden Lord Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor of Godfrey the first Elden Lord. The age of the Erdtree began amongst conflict, when Godfrey was lord of the battlefield. He led the War against the Giants. Faced the Storm Lord, alone. And then, there came a moment. When his last wor
nodes.lore: Armor of Godfrey the first Elden Lord. The age of the Erdtree began amongst conflict, when Godfrey was lord of the battlefield. He led the War against the Giants. Faced the Storm Lord, alone. And then, there came a moment. When his last worthy enemy fell. And it was then, as the story is told, that the hue of Lord Godfrey's eyes faded.

nodes.name: Dirty Chainmail
nodes.snippet: Chainmail worn by young Albinaurics. The appearance of a protruding belly provides no benefits worthy of note.
nodes.lore: Chainmail worn by young Albinaurics. The appearance of a protruding belly provides no benefits worthy of note.

nodes.name: Errant Sorcerer Robe
nodes.snippet: Commonplace robe made of thick cloth. Worn by the Errant Sorcerer Wilhelm, one of the first Tarnished to visit Roundtable Hold. A silent seeker of sorcery, who had gone so far as to make contact with the primeval current, Wilhelm was led by
nodes.lore: Commonplace robe made of thick cloth. Worn by the Errant Sorcerer Wilhelm, one of the first Tarnished to visit Roundtable Hold. A silent seeker of sorcery, who had gone so far as to make contact with the primeval current, Wilhelm was led by guidance into confrontation with his friend Vargram, and it is said that he was then taken prisoner in Roundtable Hold.

nodes.name: Erdtree Surcoat
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by soldiers sworn to defend the royal capital of Leyndell. The surcoat bears a majestic likeness of the Erdtree. Its golden backing is an honor bestowed on no other soldiers.
nodes.lore: Armor worn by soldiers sworn to defend the royal capital of Leyndell. The surcoat bears a majestic likeness of the Erdtree. Its golden backing is an honor bestowed on no other soldiers.

nodes.name: Eccentric's Armor
nodes.snippet: Unusually colorful armor. Worn by the knight Jerren. Jerren preferred a nomadic existence, but after spending time as guest of the Carian royals, he became a guest commander for General Radahn. And for the first time, the restless tumblewee
nodes.lore: Unusually colorful armor. Worn by the knight Jerren. Jerren preferred a nomadic existence, but after spending time as guest of the Carian royals, he became a guest commander for General Radahn. And for the first time, the restless tumbleweed would be bound by honorable oath

nodes.name: Eye Surcoat
nodes.snippet: Brown surcoat draped over chainmail.
nodes.lore: Brown surcoat draped over chainmail.

nodes.snippet: Ceremonial garb worn by dancers at the festivities in Dominula, the village of windmills. Faintly bloodstained.

nodes.snippet: Robe of black cloth that covers the entire body. Worn by Fia, the Deathbed Companion, on her journey after being exiled from her home.

nodes.name: Exile Armor
nodes.snippet: Damaged armor draped with a large deep-red cloth. Worn by soldiers sent to the penal colonies.
nodes.lore: Damaged armor draped with a large deep-red cloth. Worn by soldiers sent to the penal colonies.

nodes.name: Finger Maiden Robe (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Finger Maiden Robe.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Finger Maiden Robe.

nodes.name: Finger Maiden Robe
nodes.snippet: Robe worn by maidens who serve the Two Fingers. The maidens live to serve a chosen Tarnished, sharing their guidance and the wisdom of the Two Fingers.
nodes.lore: Robe worn by maidens who serve the Two Fingers. The maidens live to serve a chosen Tarnished, sharing their guidance and the wisdom of the Two Fingers.

nodes.name: Fingerprint Armor
nodes.snippet: Iron armor singed and blistered by fingers. Worn by Vyke, knight of the Roundtable Hold. No other Tarnished was closer to the throne of the Elden Lord than Vyke. But without announcement, Vyke traveled far below the capital, and was scorche
nodes.lore: Iron armor singed and blistered by fingers. Worn by Vyke, knight of the Roundtable Hold. No other Tarnished was closer to the throne of the Elden Lord than Vyke. But without announcement, Vyke traveled far below the capital, and was scorched by the flame of frenzy. Did he make his choice for his maiden, or did some other force lure him with suggestion?

nodes.name: Fingerprint Armor (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Fingerprint Armor.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Fingerprint Armor.

nodes.name: Fur Raiment
nodes.snippet: Raiment fashioned from a bristly pelt. Worn by ancestral follower warriors. The ancestral followers keep their distance from the Erdtree, awaiting new buds. They are certain to sprout from their very flesh, and indeed, their souls.
nodes.lore: Raiment fashioned from a bristly pelt. Worn by ancestral follower warriors. The ancestral followers keep their distance from the Erdtree, awaiting new buds. They are certain to sprout from their very flesh, and indeed, their souls.

nodes.name: Gelmir Knight Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by knights once royal to Praector Rykard.
nodes.lore: Armor worn by knights once royal to Praector Rykard.

nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Gelmir Knight Armor.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Gelmir Knight Armor.

nodes.name: Fire Prelate Armor
nodes.snippet: Black iron armor adorned with a red cloth. Attire of the Fire Prelates, commanders of the Fire Monks.
nodes.lore: Black iron armor adorned with a red cloth. Attire of the Fire Prelates, commanders of the Fire Monks.

nodes.name: Godrick Knight Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by knights loyal to Godrick The Grafted.
nodes.lore: Armor worn by knights loyal to Godrick The Grafted.

nodes.name: Godksin Noble Robe
nodes.snippet: Robe made by sewing together patches of smooth skin. Subcutaneous fat makes it plump and soft. Worn by Godskin Nobles known for their seven-face aprons. Strengthens the Noble Presence incantation. Nobles are the most ancient apostles who ar
nodes.lore: Robe made by sewing together patches of smooth skin. Subcutaneous fat makes it plump and soft. Worn by Godskin Nobles known for their seven-face aprons. Strengthens the Noble Presence incantation. Nobles are the most ancient apostles who are said to have assimilated inhuman physiology. Not unlike the crucible, the Erdtree in its primordial form.

nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Fire Prelate Armor.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Fire Prelate Armor.

nodes.snippet: Padded cloth armor with more than a few stains. Widely issued to foot soldiers in a lord's army.
nodes.lore: Padded cloth armor with more than a few stains. Widely issued to foot soldiers in a lord's army.

nodes.name: Fire Monk Armor
nodes.snippet: Black iron armor adorned with a red cloth. Attire of the Fire Monks.
nodes.lore: Black iron armor adorned with a red cloth. Attire of the Fire Monks.

nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Godric Knight Armor.

nodes.name: Goldmask's Rags
nodes.snippet: Worn rags that just barely cover the body. Lord Goldmask felt no draw to the vain excess of clothing; what use is finery to one who seeks greater brilliance?
nodes.lore: Worn rags that just barely cover the body. Lord Goldmask felt no draw to the vain excess of clothing; what use is finery to one who seeks greater brilliance?

nodes.name: Gravekeeper Cloak
nodes.snippet: Defensive wear encircled by bronze snakes. Worn by gladiators who were driven from the colosseum. The wearer becomes a slightly easier target for foes. The snake is viewed as a traitor to the Erdtree, and the audience delighted in seeing th
nodes.lore: Defensive wear encircled by bronze snakes. Worn by gladiators who were driven from the colosseum. The wearer becomes a slightly easier target for foes. The snake is viewed as a traitor to the Erdtree, and the audience delighted in seeing these bronze effigies beaten and battered.

nodes.name: Godskin Apostle Robe
nodes.snippet: Robe made by sewing together patches of smooth skin.
nodes.lore: Robe made by sewing together patches of smooth skin.

nodes.name: Haligtree Crest Surcoat
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by soldiers sworn to the Haligtree. The surcoat bears the crest of the Haligtree. Though watered with Miquella's own blood since it was a sapling, the Haligtree ultimately failed to grow into an Erdtree.
nodes.lore: Armor worn by soldiers sworn to the Haligtree. The surcoat bears the crest of the Haligtree. Though watered with Miquella's own blood since it was a sapling, the Haligtree ultimately failed to grow into an Erdtree.

nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Gravekeeper Cloak.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Gravekeeper Cloak.

nodes.name: Guardian Garb
nodes.snippet: Engraved golden garb. Worn by guardians of the Minor Erdtree.
nodes.lore: Engraved golden garb. Worn by guardians of the Minor Erdtree.

nodes.name: Haligtree Knight Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by knights sworn the Haligtree.
nodes.lore: Armor worn by knights sworn the Haligtree.

nodes.name: Guardian Garb (full Bloom)
nodes.snippet: Engraved golden garb. Worn by the guardians of the Minor Erdtrees. Raises the HP recovery effects of the Flask of Crimson Tears, but greatly lowers fire damage negation. It is said that the blood-red flowers blooming on their backs mark the
nodes.lore: Engraved golden garb. Worn by the guardians of the Minor Erdtrees. Raises the HP recovery effects of the Flask of Crimson Tears, but greatly lowers fire damage negation. It is said that the blood-red flowers blooming on their backs mark the senescence of their ancient pact. Perhaps the guardians are part tree already

nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Haligtree Knight Armor.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Haligtree Knight Armor.

nodes.name: High Page Clothes
nodes.snippet: Clothes of a page selected for special privileges by the noble they serve.
nodes.lore: Clothes of a page selected for special privileges by the noble they serve.

nodes.name: Highwayman Cloth Armor
nodes.snippet: Hideously stained and ragged cloth armor. Worn by former foot soldiers who have turned to banditry.
nodes.lore: Hideously stained and ragged cloth armor. Worn by former foot soldiers who have turned to banditry.

nodes.name: High Page Clothes (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the High Page Clothes.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the High Page Clothes.

nodes.name: Hoslow's Armor
nodes.snippet: Garish silver armor decorated with red embellishments. Passed down through the Hoslow family. When Juno Hoslow received an invitation to the Volcano Manor, he discreetly refused. "I have already walked many a road drenched in blood, yet nev
nodes.lore: Garish silver armor decorated with red embellishments. Passed down through the Hoslow family. When Juno Hoslow received an invitation to the Volcano Manor, he discreetly refused. "I have already walked many a road drenched in blood, yet never would I consider myself a champion."

nodes.name: Ivory-draped Tabard
nodes.snippet: Padded cloth armor with a shawl in the color of ivory draped over the shoulders. Worn by foot soldiers sworn to the Haligtree.
nodes.lore: Padded cloth armor with a shawl in the color of ivory draped over the shoulders. Worn by foot soldiers sworn to the Haligtree.

nodes.name: Knight Armor
nodes.snippet: Iron armor of an unknown knight. It is made of thin iron plate. Such metal armor is heavy, but provides considerable damage negation.
nodes.lore: Iron armor of an unknown knight. It is made of thin iron plate. Such metal armor is heavy, but provides considerable damage negation.

nodes.name: Juvenile Scholar Robe
nodes.snippet: Robe worn by young academy scholars, the juveniles birthed anew by the amber egg of Queen Rennala, the head of Raya Lucaria Academy. Yet their rebirth is not without imperfections, and thus do they repeat the process, eventually becoming ut
nodes.lore: Robe worn by young academy scholars, the juveniles birthed anew by the amber egg of Queen Rennala, the head of Raya Lucaria Academy. Yet their rebirth is not without imperfections, and thus do they repeat the process, eventually becoming utterly dependent upon it. Rebirth is as sleep to them, and with each awakening, memory fades into oblivion.

nodes.name: Kaiden Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by Kaiden sellswords.
nodes.lore: Armor worn by Kaiden sellswords.

nodes.name: Land Of Reeds Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor made from strips of iron fastened together. Worn by warriors of the Land of Reeds. The Land of Reeds has long been locked in a miserable civil war, during which time it has remained alienated from the cultures of its neighbors. Little
nodes.lore: Armor made from strips of iron fastened together. Worn by warriors of the Land of Reeds. The Land of Reeds has long been locked in a miserable civil war, during which time it has remained alienated from the cultures of its neighbors. Little wonder that the entire nation has succumbed to blood-soaked madness, or so it is said.

nodes.name: Hoslow's Armor (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Hoslow's Armor.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Hoslow's Armor.

nodes.name: Lazuli Robe
nodes.snippet: Robe worn by scholars of the Lazuli Conspectus, singular among the greater Raya Lucaria Academy. These scholars, who sought to master Carian sorcery, instead learned to see the moon as equal to the stars. This robe, in the hue of the full m
nodes.lore: Robe worn by scholars of the Lazuli Conspectus, singular among the greater Raya Lucaria Academy. These scholars, who sought to master Carian sorcery, instead learned to see the moon as equal to the stars. This robe, in the hue of the full moon, signifies their heresy.

nodes.name: Leather Armor
nodes.snippet: Lightweight and battle-proven leather armor worn by a savvy soldier.
nodes.lore: Lightweight and battle-proven leather armor worn by a savvy soldier.

nodes.name: Leather-draped Tabard
nodes.snippet: Padded cloth armor with a leather shawl draped over the shoulders.
nodes.lore: Padded cloth armor with a leather shawl draped over the shoulders.

nodes.name: Lionel's Armor (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Lionel's Armor.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Lionel's Armor.

nodes.name: Leyndell Knight Armor (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Leyndell Knight Armor.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Leyndell Knight Armor.

nodes.name: Leyndell Knight Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by knights sworn to defend the royal capital of Leyndell. Its left breast is emblazoned with a symbol of Erdtree Worship, said to have once been imbued with an incantation of protection.
nodes.lore: Armor worn by knights sworn to defend the royal capital of Leyndell. Its left breast is emblazoned with a symbol of Erdtree Worship, said to have once been imbued with an incantation of protection.

nodes.name: Lionel's Armor
nodes.snippet: Round iron armor with a banner extending from its back. Worn by the Lionel the Lionhearted.
nodes.lore: Round iron armor with a banner extending from its back. Worn by the Lionel the Lionhearted.

nodes.name: Lord Of Blood's Robe
nodes.snippet: Attire of Mohg, Lord of Blood, embroidered with an extravagant gold emblem on black cloth. The dress of a Luminary, the reigning lord and hierarch of the coming dynasty of Mohgwyn. Or perhaps, of a raving lunatic.
nodes.lore: Attire of Mohg, Lord of Blood, embroidered with an extravagant gold emblem on black cloth. The dress of a Luminary, the reigning lord and hierarch of the coming dynasty of Mohgwyn. Or perhaps, of a raving lunatic.

nodes.name: Lusat's Robe
nodes.snippet: A robe reserved for grand masters at the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Corroded by blue glintstones.
nodes.lore: A robe reserved for grand masters at the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Corroded by blue glintstones.

nodes.name: Lord Of Blood's Robe (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Lord Of Blood's Robe.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Lord Of Blood's Robe.

nodes.name: Malenia's Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor made of unalloyed gold. Worn by Malenia, Blade of Miquella. Malenia awaited Miquella at the foot of the husk. "My brother will keep his promise. He possesses the wisdom, the allure, of a god - he is the most fearsome Empyrean of all."
nodes.lore: Armor made of unalloyed gold. Worn by Malenia, Blade of Miquella. Malenia awaited Miquella at the foot of the husk. "My brother will keep his promise. He possesses the wisdom, the allure, of a god - he is the most fearsome Empyrean of all."

nodes.name: Maliketh's Armor (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Maliketh's Armor.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Maliketh's Armor.

nodes.name: Malenia's Armor (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Maleinia's Armor.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Maleinia's Armor.

nodes.name: Malformed Dragon Armor
nodes.snippet: Malformed golden armor. Adorned with various dragon imagery and worn by the misshapen Tree Sentinels. After the great ancient dragon Gransax attacked, the sentinels had an epiphany. The only way to truly protect the Erdtree was to become dr
nodes.lore: Malformed golden armor. Adorned with various dragon imagery and worn by the misshapen Tree Sentinels. After the great ancient dragon Gransax attacked, the sentinels had an epiphany. The only way to truly protect the Erdtree was to become dragons themselves.

nodes.name: Maliketh's Armor
nodes.snippet: Beast's armor made of black iron and decorated with gold. Worn by Maliketh the Black Blade. Maliketh, Queen Marika's loyal half-brother, bore a blade imbued with Destined Death, and there was not one demigod who did not fear him. Champions
nodes.lore: Beast's armor made of black iron and decorated with gold. Worn by Maliketh the Black Blade. Maliketh, Queen Marika's loyal half-brother, bore a blade imbued with Destined Death, and there was not one demigod who did not fear him. Champions knew what was at stake. Indeed, that is what made them champions.

nodes.name: Marionette Soldier Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor of metal bands arranged in a lattice. Worn by marionette soldiers, crafted to serve the sorcerers. The construction of this armor is remarkably crude, now rusted over and severely dented. For a doll, the only thing that matters is tha
nodes.lore: Armor of metal bands arranged in a lattice. Worn by marionette soldiers, crafted to serve the sorcerers. The construction of this armor is remarkably crude, now rusted over and severely dented. For a doll, the only thing that matters is that it does not break.

nodes.name: Marais Robe
nodes.snippet: Robe with a black mantle across the shoulders. Customarily worn by the head of House Marais. The sons of House Marais are all sickly born. Little wonder that Maleigh Marais would be so beguiled by the beautiful and fierce goddess who was bo
nodes.lore: Robe with a black mantle across the shoulders. Customarily worn by the head of House Marais. The sons of House Marais are all sickly born. Little wonder that Maleigh Marais would be so beguiled by the beautiful and fierce goddess who was born into rot.

nodes.name: Mausoleum Knight Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by headless knights who endlessly guard the Wandering Mausoleum. The wing-shaped ornaments on its back evoke the Deathbird. A self-inflicted curse that ties the spirits of these loyal knights to the land, having willingly beheade
nodes.lore: Armor worn by headless knights who endlessly guard the Wandering Mausoleum. The wing-shaped ornaments on its back evoke the Deathbird. A self-inflicted curse that ties the spirits of these loyal knights to the land, having willingly beheaded themselves so that they may serve theirs masters in death.

nodes.name: Mausoleum Surcoat
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by headless soldiers who endlessly guard the Wandering Mausoleum.
nodes.lore: Armor worn by headless soldiers who endlessly guard the Wandering Mausoleum.

nodes.name: Mausoleum Knight Armor (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Mausoleum Knight Armor
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Mausoleum Knight Armor

nodes.name: Mushroom Body
nodes.snippet: Mushrooms found growing all over the body. These overgrown mushroom have colonized the torso. To those enraptured by the scarlet rot, they are holy vestments that root one to the earth.
nodes.lore: Mushrooms found growing all over the body. These overgrown mushroom have colonized the torso. To those enraptured by the scarlet rot, they are holy vestments that root one to the earth.

nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Night's Cavalry Armor
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Night's Cavalry Armor

nodes.name: Night's Cavalry Armor
nodes.snippet: Pitch-black armor thinly painted with dried blood. Worn by the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds.
nodes.lore: Pitch-black armor thinly painted with dried blood. Worn by the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds.

nodes.name: Night Maiden Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by the nightmaidens of the Eternal City. Indicates the highest clerical rank, and includes a silk cape. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night
nodes.lore: Armor worn by the nightmaidens of the Eternal City. Indicates the highest clerical rank, and includes a silk cape. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night sky, in eternal anticipation of their liege. Of the coming age of the stars. And their Lord of Night.

nodes.name: Nomadic Merchant's Finery
nodes.snippet: Finery of the nomadic merchants.
nodes.lore: Finery of the nomadic merchants.

nodes.name: Noble's Traveling Garb
nodes.snippet: Traveling attire fashioned from metallic white silk thread. Worn by expatriated royalty. A gift of such rare beauty, a royal wouldn't disgrace their illustrious heritage even if found dead, in a ditch, in the middle of nowhere, while wearin
nodes.lore: Traveling attire fashioned from metallic white silk thread. Worn by expatriated royalty. A gift of such rare beauty, a royal wouldn't disgrace their illustrious heritage even if found dead, in a ditch, in the middle of nowhere, while wearing such splendid raiment.

nodes.name: Nox Monk Armor
nodes.snippet: Armor worn by the monks of the Eternal City, with a silk cape attached. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night sky, in eternal anticipation of their liege
nodes.lore: Armor worn by the monks of the Eternal City, with a silk cape attached. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night sky, in eternal anticipation of their liege. Of the coming age of the stars. And their Lord of Night.
