The Marais family has a dual history spanning generations, serving as both executioners and castellans of the Shaded Castle. This mask bears the likeness of the first of their line.

nodes.name: Marionette Soldier Helm
nodes.snippet: Cylindrical helm of plate metal reinforced with a lattice. Worm by marionette soldiers, crafted to serve the sorcerers.
nodes.lore: Cylindrical helm of plate metal reinforced with a lattice. Worm by marionette soldiers, crafted to serve the sorcerers.

nodes.name: Leyndell Soldier Helm
nodes.snippet: Helm worn by soldiers sworn to defend the royal capital of Leyndell. Made from durable iron, layered with a chainmail coif beneath.
nodes.lore: Helm worn by soldiers sworn to defend the royal capital of Leyndell. Made from durable iron, layered with a chainmail coif beneath.

nodes.name: Marionette Soldier Helm
nodes.snippet: Cylindrical helm of plate metal reinforced with a lattice. Worn by marionette soldiers, crafted to serve the sorcerers.
nodes.lore: Cylindrical helm of plate metal reinforced with a lattice. Worn by marionette soldiers, crafted to serve the sorcerers.

nodes.name: Marionette Soldier Birdhelm
nodes.snippet: Metal helm formed in the likeness of the face of a bird.
nodes.lore: Metal helm formed in the likeness of the face of a bird.

nodes.name: Night Maiden Twin Crown
nodes.snippet: Twin crowns worn by the nightmaidens of the Eternal City. Indicates the highest clerical rank, and hides the eyes with silk. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a fa
nodes.lore: Twin crowns worn by the nightmaidens of the Eternal City. Indicates the highest clerical rank, and hides the eyes with silk. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night sky, in eternal anticipation of their liege. Of the coming age of the stars. And their Lord of Night.

nodes.name: Mushroom Head
nodes.snippet: Mushrooms found growing all over the body. These overgrown mushroom have colonized the head.
nodes.lore: Mushrooms found growing all over the body. These overgrown mushroom have colonized the head.

nodes.name: Night's Cavalry Helm
nodes.snippet: Pitch-black helm with flowing black hair. Worn by the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds.
nodes.lore: Pitch-black helm with flowing black hair. Worn by the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds.

nodes.name: Mask Of Confidence
nodes.snippet: Mask with the mouth sewn shut with gold thread. Increases arcane. When Radagon married Rennala, he ordered the Carian magic preceptors to don these masks. To make it clear that all of their matters were to be kept strictly private.
nodes.lore: Mask with the mouth sewn shut with gold thread. Increases arcane. When Radagon married Rennala, he ordered the Carian magic preceptors to don these masks. To make it clear that all of their matters were to be kept strictly private.

nodes.name: Navy Hood
nodes.snippet: A hooded cloak of deep navy. Worn by expatriated royalty. Increases mind. Such cloaks were gifted to those who departed on missions to faraway lands, from which they would never return. But what choice did they have, having seen the guidanc
nodes.lore: A hooded cloak of deep navy. Worn by expatriated royalty. Increases mind. Such cloaks were gifted to those who departed on missions to faraway lands, from which they would never return. But what choice did they have, having seen the guidance of grace?

nodes.name: Night's Cavalry Helm (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Night's Cavalry Helm.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Night's Cavalry Helm.

nodes.name: Mushroom Crown
nodes.snippet: Mushrooms found growing all over the body. These overgrown mushrooms form a towering headpiece. Raises attack power when something nearby suffers from poison or rot. Long ago, great lords served the scarlet rot. Perhaps such fungal bodies s
nodes.lore: Mushrooms found growing all over the body. These overgrown mushrooms form a towering headpiece. Raises attack power when something nearby suffers from poison or rot. Long ago, great lords served the scarlet rot. Perhaps such fungal bodies served as their crowns.

nodes.name: Nomadic Merchant's Chapeau
nodes.snippet: Chapeau of the nomadic merchants.
nodes.lore: Chapeau of the nomadic merchants.

nodes.name: Nox Mirrorhelm
nodes.snippet: Helm fashioned from a crystal looking-glass. One among the Eternal City's ritual implements. Easily broken and weak against striking attacks. Worn by those committed to high treason, it wards off the intervention of the Greater Will and its
nodes.lore: Helm fashioned from a crystal looking-glass. One among the Eternal City's ritual implements. Easily broken and weak against striking attacks. Worn by those committed to high treason, it wards off the intervention of the Greater Will and its vassal Fingers.

nodes.name: Nox Monk Hood
nodes.snippet: Silk hood worn by the monks of the Eternal City. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night sky, in eternal anticipation of their liege. Of the coming age of
nodes.lore: Silk hood worn by the monks of the Eternal City. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night sky, in eternal anticipation of their liege. Of the coming age of the stars. And their Lord of Night.

nodes.name: Old Aristocrat Cowl
nodes.snippet: Cowl made of soft cloth. Travel attire worn by nobles in the capital. Garb favored by the aged. Abandoning their birthplace after the Shattering, these undead wanderers are the pitiful product of unending life.
nodes.lore: Cowl made of soft cloth. Travel attire worn by nobles in the capital. Garb favored by the aged. Abandoning their birthplace after the Shattering, these undead wanderers are the pitiful product of unending life.

nodes.name: Nox Swordstress Crown
nodes.snippet: Crown worn by the swordstresses of the Eternal City. These women are the personal guards of the nightmaidens, and the silk hides their eyes. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they
nodes.lore: Crown worn by the swordstresses of the Eternal City. These women are the personal guards of the nightmaidens, and the silk hides their eyes. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night sky, in eternal anticipation of their liege. Of the coming age of the stars. And their Lord of Night.

nodes.name: Okina Mask
nodes.snippet: A wooden mask that depicts an old man bearing his teeth. The source of the sobriquet of the great swordman of the Land of Reeds. Raises dexterity as it lowers focus.
nodes.lore: A wooden mask that depicts an old man bearing his teeth. The source of the sobriquet of the great swordman of the Land of Reeds. Raises dexterity as it lowers focus.

nodes.name: Nox Swordstress Crown (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Nox Swordstress Crown.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Nox Swordstress Crown.

nodes.name: Nox Monk Hood (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Nox Monk Hood.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Nox Monk Hood.

nodes.name: Octopus Head
nodes.snippet: A land octopus whelp worn directly on the head. Has a lingering warmth reminiscent of human skin. Those who can withstand the smell will find its organic elasticity excellent for negating strikes.
nodes.lore: A land octopus whelp worn directly on the head. Has a lingering warmth reminiscent of human skin. Those who can withstand the smell will find its organic elasticity excellent for negating strikes.

nodes.name: Omen Helm
nodes.snippet: Malformed helm resembling an Omen with its horns cut off.
nodes.lore: Malformed helm resembling an Omen with its horns cut off.

nodes.name: Olivinus Glintstone Crown
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone crowns bestowed upon Raya Lucaria scholars whose pursuits were deemed worthy. Increases intelligence to the detriment of HP. The lineage of the Olivinus Conspectus began with the sorcerer Lusat, and its adherents conti
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone crowns bestowed upon Raya Lucaria scholars whose pursuits were deemed worthy. Increases intelligence to the detriment of HP. The lineage of the Olivinus Conspectus began with the sorcerer Lusat, and its adherents continue his study of meteors.

nodes.name: Perfumer Hood
nodes.snippet: Hood of an Erdtree Capital perfumer.
nodes.lore: Hood of an Erdtree Capital perfumer.

nodes.name: Omensmirk Mask
nodes.snippet: Mask with long, hideously twisted horns worn by the Omenkillers. Increases strength. Bears the smirking face of an elder, twisted in wicked delight. This visage is carved in the image of the evil spirits that haunt the Omen in their nightma
nodes.lore: Mask with long, hideously twisted horns worn by the Omenkillers. Increases strength. Bears the smirking face of an elder, twisted in wicked delight. This visage is carved in the image of the evil spirits that haunt the Omen in their nightmares.

nodes.name: Preceptor's Big Hat
nodes.snippet: Large hat with the movements of the stars drawn on the inside of the brim. Worn by the magic preceptors who served the Carian royals.
nodes.lore: Large hat with the movements of the stars drawn on the inside of the brim. Worn by the magic preceptors who served the Carian royals.

nodes.name: Prisoner Iron Mask
nodes.snippet: Iron mask forced on a prisoner convicted of an appalling crime. Thick, heavy, and utterly stifling. A foul creation designed to torment the wearer, either slowly fermenting hatred within their heart, or a spiritual fervor that is near indis
nodes.lore: Iron mask forced on a prisoner convicted of an appalling crime. Thick, heavy, and utterly stifling. A foul creation designed to torment the wearer, either slowly fermenting hatred within their heart, or a spiritual fervor that is near indistinguishable from it.

nodes.name: Queen's Crescent Crown
nodes.snippet: A tall crown depicting the moon. Worn by Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon. Increases intelligence. When Rennala, head of both the Academy of Raya Lucaria and the Carian royal family, lost her husband Radagon, her heart went along with him. A
nodes.lore: A tall crown depicting the moon. Worn by Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon. Increases intelligence. When Rennala, head of both the Academy of Raya Lucaria and the Carian royal family, lost her husband Radagon, her heart went along with him. And then, those at the academy realized. That Rennala was no champion, after all.

nodes.name: Radahn Soldier Helm
nodes.snippet: Helm worn by soldiers who fought by General Radahn's side. Its visor is fashioned after a lion's fangs.
nodes.lore: Helm worn by soldiers who fought by General Radahn's side. Its visor is fashioned after a lion's fangs.

nodes.name: Page Hood
nodes.snippet: Hood worn by pages who serve the nobility and are mindful to keep them out of harm's way. The unassuming sack-like appearance befits their unseen and unknown stature.
nodes.lore: Hood worn by pages who serve the nobility and are mindful to keep them out of harm's way. The unassuming sack-like appearance befits their unseen and unknown stature.

nodes.name: Prophet Blindfold
nodes.snippet: Blindfold of exiled prophets who foretold misfortune — and were persecuted and driven from their homes as a result. Why hesitate, if the path leading to the future is clear? Just close your eyes, and walk.
nodes.lore: Blindfold of exiled prophets who foretold misfortune — and were persecuted and driven from their homes as a result. Why hesitate, if the path leading to the future is clear? Just close your eyes, and walk.

nodes.name: Pumpkin Helm
nodes.snippet: An oval helmet large enough to cover any head. Very heavy and very hard. Reduces damage from headshots and impacts. The inside of the helm is pitch black, keeping the crazed warrior within from panicking. Perhaps its rather roomy interior a
nodes.lore: An oval helmet large enough to cover any head. Very heavy and very hard. Reduces damage from headshots and impacts. The inside of the helm is pitch black, keeping the crazed warrior within from panicking. Perhaps its rather roomy interior also helps alleviate feelings of pressure and claustrophobia.

nodes.name: Radahn's Redmane Helm
nodes.snippet: Helm of the golden lion, with flowing red hair. Worn by General Radahn.
nodes.lore: Helm of the golden lion, with flowing red hair. Worn by General Radahn.

nodes.name: Ragged Hat (altered)
nodes.snippet: Lighter version of the Ragged Hat.
nodes.lore: Lighter version of the Ragged Hat.

nodes.name: Radiant Gold Mask
nodes.snippet: A mask designed to resemble a blazing golden halo. Created and left behind by Lord Goldmask, a staunch pursuer of Golden Order fundamentalism. Strenthens Golden Order incantations. Its striking design represents both the brilliant inspirati
nodes.lore: A mask designed to resemble a blazing golden halo. Created and left behind by Lord Goldmask, a staunch pursuer of Golden Order fundamentalism. Strenthens Golden Order incantations. Its striking design represents both the brilliant inspiration that once shone upon him, and the vision of a ring that he will surely find at the end of his pursuit. "To you who seek to shine as I do, wear it well!"

nodes.name: Ragged Hat
nodes.snippet: Helm pieced together from scavenged metal.
nodes.lore: Helm pieced together from scavenged metal.

nodes.name: Raya Lucarian Helm
nodes.snippet: Helm worn by Raya Lucaria Academy soldiers. Its brow adorned with a single cuckoo's feather.
nodes.lore: Helm worn by Raya Lucaria Academy soldiers. Its brow adorned with a single cuckoo's feather.

nodes.name: Rotten Duelist Helm
nodes.snippet: Bronze helm decorated with innumerable snakes, eaten through by scarlet rot. Worn by gladiators who were driven from the colosseum. The wearer becomes a slightly easier target for foes.
nodes.lore: Bronze helm decorated with innumerable snakes, eaten through by scarlet rot. Worn by gladiators who were driven from the colosseum. The wearer becomes a slightly easier target for foes.

nodes.name: Royal Remains Helm
nodes.snippet: Helm graced with gold human bones. Worn by the unspeaking adherent of Sir Gideon the All-Knowing.
nodes.lore: Helm graced with gold human bones. Worn by the unspeaking adherent of Sir Gideon the All-Knowing.

nodes.name: Royal Knight Helm
nodes.snippet: Silver helm of Loretta, a Knight who served Miquella's Haligtree.
nodes.lore: Silver helm of Loretta, a Knight who served Miquella's Haligtree.

nodes.name: Redmane Knight Helm
nodes.snippet: Helm worn by knights who fought by General Radahn's side.
nodes.lore: Helm worn by knights who fought by General Radahn's side.

nodes.name: Sacred Crown Helm
nodes.snippet: Flanged iron cap adorned with a crown of unalloyed gold. Increases faith. Worn by foot soldiers sworn to the Haligtree. Who is it that Miquella shall bless, if not the low and the meek?
nodes.lore: Flanged iron cap adorned with a crown of unalloyed gold. Increases faith. Worn by foot soldiers sworn to the Haligtree. Who is it that Miquella shall bless, if not the low and the meek?

nodes.name: Ruler's Mask
nodes.snippet: Mask in the image of a wizened sage. Customary dress among lords in a smaller nation. Increases faith. Such a mask illustrates the qualities of an ideal lord: chiefly, wise and possessing a certain defanged geniality. One at the center of s
nodes.lore: Mask in the image of a wizened sage. Customary dress among lords in a smaller nation. Increases faith. Such a mask illustrates the qualities of an ideal lord: chiefly, wise and possessing a certain defanged geniality. One at the center of society often finds these qualities most expedient.

nodes.name: Scaled Helm
nodes.snippet: Helm worn by Old Knight Istvan. The corroded metal is reinforced with rock-hard scales, making it highly effective against non-physical attacks.
nodes.lore: Helm worn by Old Knight Istvan. The corroded metal is reinforced with rock-hard scales, making it highly effective against non-physical attacks.

nodes.name: Shining Horned Headband
nodes.snippet: Headband decorated by a pair of shining horns. Worn by ancestral follower shamans.
nodes.lore: Headband decorated by a pair of shining horns. Worn by ancestral follower shamans.

nodes.name: Sanguine Noble Hood
nodes.snippet: Hood of dyed black cloth featuring gold embroidery. Worn by the nobles who serve the Lord of Blood. Known to strike from pools of blood, these assassins are missionaries come to share the gospel of accursed blood.
nodes.lore: Hood of dyed black cloth featuring gold embroidery. Worn by the nobles who serve the Lord of Blood. Known to strike from pools of blood, these assassins are missionaries come to share the gospel of accursed blood.

nodes.name: Sage Hood
nodes.snippet: A burgundy pointed hood. Attire of the wise sages who were deemed heretical. Evidence that the wearer was driven from town.
nodes.lore: A burgundy pointed hood. Attire of the wise sages who were deemed heretical. Evidence that the wearer was driven from town.

nodes.name: Skeletal Mask
nodes.snippet: Skeletal mask that tightly grips the face. Worn by the assassin's of Ravensmount.
nodes.lore: Skeletal mask that tightly grips the face. Worn by the assassin's of Ravensmount.

nodes.name: Snow Witch Hat
nodes.snippet: Witch's pointed hat, frigid and frozen through. Of a style associated with practitioners of heretical sorcery. Strengthens cold sorcery. Once worn by the snowy crone who the young Ranni encountered deep in the woods. She was a witch, and we
nodes.lore: Witch's pointed hat, frigid and frozen through. Of a style associated with practitioners of heretical sorcery. Strengthens cold sorcery. Once worn by the snowy crone who the young Ranni encountered deep in the woods. She was a witch, and well versed in cold sorceries. It is said that the doll that houses Ranni's soul was modeled after her. That old witch was Ranni's secret mentor.

nodes.name: Spellblade's Pointed Hat
nodes.snippet: Glintstone sorcerer Rogier's traveling attire, graced with an intricate, aristocratic decoration. Strengthens glintstone sorcery skills.
nodes.lore: Glintstone sorcerer Rogier's traveling attire, graced with an intricate, aristocratic decoration. Strengthens glintstone sorcery skills.

nodes.name: Traveling Maiden Hood
nodes.snippet: Hood worn by traveling maidens.
nodes.lore: Hood worn by traveling maidens.

nodes.name: Silver Tear Mask
nodes.snippet: Mask fashioned from the corpse of a formless Silver Tear, supported by its hardened, shed husk. Greatly increases arcane to the detriment of physical attack power. To imitate the imitator is a cunning play indeed.
nodes.lore: Mask fashioned from the corpse of a formless Silver Tear, supported by its hardened, shed husk. Greatly increases arcane to the detriment of physical attack power. To imitate the imitator is a cunning play indeed.

nodes.name: Traveler's Hat
nodes.snippet: Hat of a traveling perfumer of no renown.
nodes.lore: Hat of a traveling perfumer of no renown.

nodes.name: Vulgar Militia Helm
nodes.snippet: Helm worn by lean, mean, and filthy militiamen. The upward extension serves to create an appearance of larger size, however slightly.
nodes.lore: Helm worn by lean, mean, and filthy militiamen. The upward extension serves to create an appearance of larger size, however slightly.

nodes.name: Witch's Glintstone Crown
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone crowns bestowed upon Raya Lucaria scholars whose pursuits were deemed worthy.
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone crowns bestowed upon Raya Lucaria scholars whose pursuits were deemed worthy.

nodes.name: Twinsage Glintstone Crown
nodes.snippet: One of the glintstone crowns bestowed upon Raya Lucaria scholars whose pursuits were deemed worthy. Greatly increases intelligence to the detriment of HP and stamina. Scholars of the Twinsage Conspectus were the elites of the academy, permi
nodes.lore: One of the glintstone crowns bestowed upon Raya Lucaria scholars whose pursuits were deemed worthy. Greatly increases intelligence to the detriment of HP and stamina. Scholars of the Twinsage Conspectus were the elites of the academy, permitted to study and excel in sorceries of all kinds.

nodes.name: Veteran's Helm
nodes.snippet: An old helm that has seen many battles.Worn by Niall, the great veteran general of Sol.
nodes.lore: An old helm that has seen many battles.Worn by Niall, the great veteran general of Sol.

nodes.name: White Mask
nodes.snippet: Bloodstained, faintly grinning mask. Worn by war surgeons who were effectively mercy killers. The Lord of Blood's curse enlivens the wearer when bloodletting occurs. Slightly raises attack power when there is blood loss nearby.
nodes.lore: Bloodstained, faintly grinning mask. Worn by war surgeons who were effectively mercy killers. The Lord of Blood's curse enlivens the wearer when bloodletting occurs. Slightly raises attack power when there is blood loss nearby.

nodes.name: Tree Sentinel Helm
nodes.snippet: Golden helm of the heavy cavalry Tree Sentinels who serve the Erdtree.
nodes.lore: Golden helm of the heavy cavalry Tree Sentinels who serve the Erdtree.

nodes.name: Twinned Helm
nodes.snippet: Helm depicting entwined twins of gold and silver.
nodes.lore: Helm depicting entwined twins of gold and silver.

nodes.name: Vagabond Knight Helm
nodes.snippet: Helm of a knight banished from their motherland. Dirty and battered after enduring a lengthy vagabond journey.
nodes.lore: Helm of a knight banished from their motherland. Dirty and battered after enduring a lengthy vagabond journey.

nodes.name: Zamor Mask
nodes.snippet: Mask worn by knights of Zamor, hailed as heroes in the War against the Giants. These long-lived warriors, clad in biting, freezing winds, are said to have been the mortal enemies of the Fire Giants since time immemorial.
nodes.lore: Mask worn by knights of Zamor, hailed as heroes in the War against the Giants. These long-lived warriors, clad in biting, freezing winds, are said to have been the mortal enemies of the Fire Giants since time immemorial.

nodes.name: Astrologer Trousers
nodes.snippet: Trousers worn inside a robe. Worn by those who look to the cosmos above. They read fate in the stars, and are said to be heirs of the glintstone sorcerers. But alas, the night sky no longer cradles fate.
nodes.lore: Trousers worn inside a robe. Worn by those who look to the cosmos above. They read fate in the stars, and are said to be heirs of the glintstone sorcerers. But alas, the night sky no longer cradles fate.

nodes.name: Bandit Boots
nodes.snippet: Leather boots worn by bandits.
nodes.lore: Leather boots worn by bandits.

nodes.name: Battlemage Legwraps
nodes.snippet: Legwraps worn by the scholars of the Raya Lucaria Academy, tattered from being worn on the battlefield.
nodes.lore: Legwraps worn by the scholars of the Raya Lucaria Academy, tattered from being worn on the battlefield.

nodes.name: Alberich's Trousers
nodes.snippet: Mad Tongue Alberich's trousers.
nodes.lore: Mad Tongue Alberich's trousers.

nodes.name: Aristocrat Boots
nodes.snippet: Boots made from tanned leather. Travel attire worn by nobles in the capital. Abandoning their birthplace after the shattering, these undead wanderers are the pitiful product of unending life.
nodes.lore: Boots made from tanned leather. Travel attire worn by nobles in the capital. Abandoning their birthplace after the shattering, these undead wanderers are the pitiful product of unending life.

nodes.name: Banished Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Thick, full set of armor covering the entire body. These greaves were worn by knights who, whether by misfortune or misdeed, were forced to abandon their homes. These fierce warriors were each and all accomplished. Perhaps that is why, desp
nodes.lore: Thick, full set of armor covering the entire body. These greaves were worn by knights who, whether by misfortune or misdeed, were forced to abandon their homes. These fierce warriors were each and all accomplished. Perhaps that is why, despite their territorial losses, they were still named knights.

nodes.name: Blackflame Monk Greave
nodes.snippet: Black iron greaves featuring a flame motif.
nodes.lore: Black iron greaves featuring a flame motif.

nodes.name: Beast Champion Greaves
nodes.snippet: Silver greaves engraved with tiny beasts. Worn by Bernahl the Recusant.
nodes.lore: Silver greaves engraved with tiny beasts. Worn by Bernahl the Recusant.

nodes.name: Black Knife Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves used by the Black Knife Assassins. Crafted with scale armor that makes no sound. The assassins that carried out the deeds of the Night of the Black Knives were all women, and rumored to be Numen who had close ties with Marika hersel
nodes.lore: Greaves used by the Black Knife Assassins. Crafted with scale armor that makes no sound. The assassins that carried out the deeds of the Night of the Black Knives were all women, and rumored to be Numen who had close ties with Marika herself.

nodes.name: Blaidd's Greaves
nodes.snippet: Well-worn black greaves of the man-wolf Blaidd.
nodes.lore: Well-worn black greaves of the man-wolf Blaidd.

nodes.name: Cleanrot Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves of the Cleanrot Knights, celebrated for their undefeated campaign in the Shattering.
nodes.lore: Greaves of the Cleanrot Knights, celebrated for their undefeated campaign in the Shattering.

nodes.name: Blue Silver Mail Skirt
nodes.snippet: Chainmail skirt crafted with blue silver. Worn by the wolf-riding Albinauric archers.
nodes.lore: Chainmail skirt crafted with blue silver. Worn by the wolf-riding Albinauric archers.

nodes.name: Briar Greaves
nodes.snippet: Battered iron greaves from a foreign land. Worn by Elemer of the Briar.
nodes.lore: Battered iron greaves from a foreign land. Worn by Elemer of the Briar.

nodes.name: Brave's Legwraps
nodes.snippet: Greaves wrapped in thick leather. Garb worn by warriors of the frigid uplands. Has a fur lining which excels at keeping the cold at bay.
nodes.lore: Greaves wrapped in thick leather. Garb worn by warriors of the frigid uplands. Has a fur lining which excels at keeping the cold at bay.

nodes.name: Commoner's Shoes
nodes.snippet: Modest shoes made of cloth. Standard wear for commoners of the Lands Between. Only, there are no commoners remaining with their wits about them.
nodes.lore: Modest shoes made of cloth. Standard wear for commoners of the Lands Between. Only, there are no commoners remaining with their wits about them.

nodes.name: Carian Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves of the enchanted knights that once served the Carian royal family. The enchanted knights, anointed by the Lunar Queen, were all decorated heroes, were heroes of the highest honors, but fell into disarray with the decline of the roya
nodes.lore: Greaves of the enchanted knights that once served the Carian royal family. The enchanted knights, anointed by the Lunar Queen, were all decorated heroes, were heroes of the highest honors, but fell into disarray with the decline of the royal family.

nodes.name: Cloth Trousers
nodes.snippet: Trousers made of coarse material, commonly worn in the Lands Between.
nodes.lore: Trousers made of coarse material, commonly worn in the Lands Between.

nodes.name: Chain Leggings
nodes.snippet: Leggings made of woven chain. Standard issue for ordinary soldiers. Though plain in appearance, they offer dependable protection.
nodes.lore: Leggings made of woven chain. Standard issue for ordinary soldiers. Though plain in appearance, they offer dependable protection.

nodes.name: Bloodhound Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Metal greaves of the Bloodhound Knights. The Bloodhound Knights are trained as hunters and known to be unshakable trackers. Without the use of language, each knight chooses his own master. Once the decision has been made the knight stays lo
nodes.lore: Metal greaves of the Bloodhound Knights. The Bloodhound Knights are trained as hunters and known to be unshakable trackers. Without the use of language, each knight chooses his own master. Once the decision has been made the knight stays loyal for life.

nodes.name: Bull-goat Greaves
nodes.snippet: Great Horned Tragoth's greaves. Covers its wearer with a pair of giant horns, providing staunch poise.
nodes.lore: Great Horned Tragoth's greaves. Covers its wearer with a pair of giant horns, providing staunch poise.

nodes.name: Cuckoo Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by Raya Lucaria Academy knights. Time has yet to dull their luster.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by Raya Lucaria Academy knights. Time has yet to dull their luster.

nodes.name: Crucible Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves of the Crucible Knights who served Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. Hold the power of the crucible of life, the primordial form of the Erdtree. Strengthen Aspects of the Crucible incantations. In time, the strength shown by these knig
nodes.lore: Greaves of the Crucible Knights who served Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. Hold the power of the crucible of life, the primordial form of the Erdtree. Strengthen Aspects of the Crucible incantations. In time, the strength shown by these knights, and even their appearance, was seen as chaotic and deserving of scorn.

nodes.name: Confessor Boots
nodes.snippet: Leather boots of the church confessors. The churches outside the Lands Between, dedicated to the teachings of the Two Fingers, send confessors out to follow the guidance of grace. The confessors are loyal servants to the Two Fingers, ready
nodes.lore: Leather boots of the church confessors. The churches outside the Lands Between, dedicated to the teachings of the Two Fingers, send confessors out to follow the guidance of grace. The confessors are loyal servants to the Two Fingers, ready to hunt down and quietly dispose of their enemies.

nodes.name: Drake Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves wrapped in thick leather. Garb worn by warriors of the frigid uplands. Has a fur lining which excels at keeping the cold at bay.
nodes.lore: Greaves wrapped in thick leather. Garb worn by warriors of the frigid uplands. Has a fur lining which excels at keeping the cold at bay.

nodes.name: Consort's Trousers
nodes.snippet: Fine white trousers, perfectly suited for wearing beneath a silk robe.
nodes.lore: Fine white trousers, perfectly suited for wearing beneath a silk robe.

nodes.name: Deathbed Smalls
nodes.snippet: Skirt worn by Phia, the Deathbed Companion.
nodes.lore: Skirt worn by Phia, the Deathbed Companion.

nodes.name: Eccentric's Breeches
nodes.snippet: The knight Jerren's breeches. Jerren preferred a nomadic existence, but after spending time as a guest of the Carian royals, he became the guest commander for General Radahn. And for the first time, the restless tumbleweed would be bound by
nodes.lore: The knight Jerren's breeches. Jerren preferred a nomadic existence, but after spending time as a guest of the Carian royals, he became the guest commander for General Radahn. And for the first time, the restless tumbleweed would be bound by honorable oath.

nodes.name: Duelist Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves encircles by bronze snakes. Worn by gladiators who were driven from the colosseum. The wearer becomes a slightly easier target for foes. The snake is viewed as a traitor to the Erdtree, and the audience delighted in seeing these bro
nodes.lore: Greaves encircles by bronze snakes. Worn by gladiators who were driven from the colosseum. The wearer becomes a slightly easier target for foes. The snake is viewed as a traitor to the Erdtree, and the audience delighted in seeing these bronze effigies beaten and battered.

nodes.name: Elden Lord Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves of Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. The age of the Erdtree began amongst conflict, when Godfrey was lord of the battlefield. He led the War against the Giants. Faced the Storm Lord, alone. And then, there came a moment. When his last
nodes.lore: Greaves of Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. The age of the Erdtree began amongst conflict, when Godfrey was lord of the battlefield. He led the War against the Giants. Faced the Storm Lord, alone. And then, there came a moment. When his last worthy enemy fell. And it was then, as the story is told, that the hue of Lord Godfrey's eyes faded.

nodes.name: Depraved Perfumer Trousers
nodes.snippet: Trousers worn by depraved perfumers.
nodes.lore: Trousers worn by depraved perfumers.

nodes.name: Errant Sorcerer Boots
nodes.snippet: Commonplace leather boots, sturdy enough to withstand a long journey.
nodes.lore: Commonplace leather boots, sturdy enough to withstand a long journey.

nodes.name: Fire Prelate Greaves
nodes.snippet: Black iron greaves with the appearance of flames. Attire of the Fire Prelates, commanders of the Fire Monks.
nodes.lore: Black iron greaves with the appearance of flames. Attire of the Fire Prelates, commanders of the Fire Monks.

nodes.name: Fur Leggings
nodes.snippet: Leggings fashioned from bristly pelts. Worn by ancestral follower warriors. The ancestral followers keep their distance from the Erdtree, awaiting new buds. They are certain to sprout from their very flesh, and indeed, their souls.
nodes.lore: Leggings fashioned from bristly pelts. Worn by ancestral follower warriors. The ancestral followers keep their distance from the Erdtree, awaiting new buds. They are certain to sprout from their very flesh, and indeed, their souls.

nodes.name: Fingerprint Greaves
nodes.snippet: Iron greaves singed and blistered by fingers. Worn by Vyke, knight of the Roundtable Hold. No other Tarnished was closer to the throne of the Elden Lord than Vyke. But without announcement, Vyke traveled far below the capital, and was scorc
nodes.lore: Iron greaves singed and blistered by fingers. Worn by Vyke, knight of the Roundtable Hold. No other Tarnished was closer to the throne of the Elden Lord than Vyke. But without announcement, Vyke traveled far below the capital, and was scorched by the flame of frenzy. Did he make his choice for his maiden, or did some other force lure him with suggestion?

nodes.name: Finger Maiden Shoes
nodes.snippet: Shoes worn by maidens who serve the Two Fingers. The maidens live to serve a chosen Tarnished, sharing their guidance and the wisdom of the Two Fingers. The guidance of grace would ensure that the pair be brought together. Or at least, such
nodes.lore: Shoes worn by maidens who serve the Two Fingers. The maidens live to serve a chosen Tarnished, sharing their guidance and the wisdom of the Two Fingers. The guidance of grace would ensure that the pair be brought together. Or at least, such was the promise long ago.

nodes.name: Exile Greaves
nodes.snippet: Damaged iron greaves. Worn by soldiers sent to the penal colonies.
nodes.lore: Damaged iron greaves. Worn by soldiers sent to the penal colonies.

nodes.name: Foot Soldier Greaves
nodes.snippet: Metal Graves that have already been mended countless times. Widely issued to foot soldiers in a lord's army.
nodes.lore: Metal Graves that have already been mended countless times. Widely issued to foot soldiers in a lord's army.

nodes.name: Gelmir Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by knights once loyal to Praetor Rykard. Time has yet to dull their luster.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by knights once loyal to Praetor Rykard. Time has yet to dull their luster.

nodes.name: Godrick Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by knights loyal to Godrick the Grafted. Time has yet to dull their luster.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by knights loyal to Godrick the Grafted. Time has yet to dull their luster.

nodes.name: Fire Monk Greaves
nodes.snippet: Black iron greaves featuring a flame motif. Attire of the Fire Monks.
nodes.lore: Black iron greaves featuring a flame motif. Attire of the Fire Monks.

nodes.name: Godrick Soldier Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by soldiers loyal to Godrick the Grafted. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by soldiers loyal to Godrick the Grafted. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.

nodes.name: Gold Waistwrap
nodes.snippet: Waistwrap made in the image of Erdtree branches. A minimal adornment made by Lord Goldmask's disciples. Those disciples have long since left him.
nodes.lore: Waistwrap made in the image of Erdtree branches. A minimal adornment made by Lord Goldmask's disciples. Those disciples have long since left him.

nodes.name: Haligtree Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by knights sworn to the Haligtree. Time has yet to dull their luster.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by knights sworn to the Haligtree. Time has yet to dull their luster.

nodes.name: Godskin Apostle Trousers
nodes.snippet: Trousers made by seweing together patches of smooth skin.
nodes.lore: Trousers made by seweing together patches of smooth skin.

nodes.name: Hoslow's Greaves
nodes.snippet: Garish silver greaves decorated with red embellishments. Passed down through the Hoslow family.
nodes.lore: Garish silver greaves decorated with red embellishments. Passed down through the Hoslow family.

nodes.name: Haligtree Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by soldiers sworn to the Haligtree. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by soldiers sworn to the Haligtree. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.

nodes.name: Godskin Noble Trousers
nodes.snippet: Trousers made by sewing together patches of smooth skin. Subcutaneous fat makes them plump and soft. Worn by Godskin Nobles. Nobles are the most ancient apostles who are said to have assimilated inhuman physiology. Not unlike the crucible,
nodes.lore: Trousers made by sewing together patches of smooth skin. Subcutaneous fat makes them plump and soft. Worn by Godskin Nobles. Nobles are the most ancient apostles who are said to have assimilated inhuman physiology. Not unlike the crucible, the Erdtree in its primordial form.

nodes.name: Guardian Greaves
nodes.snippet: Engraved golden greaves. Worn by the guardians of the Minor Erdtrees.
nodes.lore: Engraved golden greaves. Worn by the guardians of the Minor Erdtrees.

nodes.name: Kaiden Trousers
nodes.snippet: Trousers worn by Kaiden sellswords.
nodes.lore: Trousers worn by Kaiden sellswords.

nodes.name: Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Iron greaves of an unknown knight. It is made of thin iron plate. Such metal armor is heavy, but provides considerable damage negation.
nodes.lore: Iron greaves of an unknown knight. It is made of thin iron plate. Such metal armor is heavy, but provides considerable damage negation.

nodes.name: Land Of Reeds Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves wrapped in tough leather.
nodes.lore: Greaves wrapped in tough leather.

nodes.name: Leather Boots
nodes.snippet: Lightweight and battle-proven leather boots worn by a savvy soldier. Many admire the wearer of this armor for his chivalrous and forthright spirit.
nodes.lore: Lightweight and battle-proven leather boots worn by a savvy soldier. Many admire the wearer of this armor for his chivalrous and forthright spirit.

nodes.name: Leather Trousers
nodes.snippet: Well-made leather trousers. The lower legs are each bound in cord for ease of movement.
nodes.lore: Well-made leather trousers. The lower legs are each bound in cord for ease of movement.

nodes.name: Leyndell Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by knights sworn to defend the royal capital of Leyndell. Time has yet to dull their luster.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by knights sworn to defend the royal capital of Leyndell. Time has yet to dull their luster.

nodes.name: Leyndell Soldier Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by soldiers sworn to defend the royal capital of Leyndell. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by soldiers sworn to defend the royal capital of Leyndell. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.

nodes.name: Lionel's Greaves
nodes.snippet: Rounded iron greaves. Worn by Lionel the Lionhearted.
nodes.lore: Rounded iron greaves. Worn by Lionel the Lionhearted.

nodes.name: Malformed Dragon Greaves
nodes.snippet: Malformed golden greaves.
nodes.lore: Malformed golden greaves.

nodes.name: Malenia's Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves made of unalloyed gold. Worn by Malenia, Blade of Miquella. Malenia awaited Miquella at the foot of the husk. "My brother will keep his promise. He possesses the wisdom, the allure, of a god—he is the most fearsome Empyrean of all."
nodes.lore: Greaves made of unalloyed gold. Worn by Malenia, Blade of Miquella. Malenia awaited Miquella at the foot of the husk. "My brother will keep his promise. He possesses the wisdom, the allure, of a god—he is the most fearsome Empyrean of all."

nodes.name: Maliketh's Greaves
nodes.snippet: Beast's greaves made of black iron and decorated with gold. Worn by Maliketh the Black Blade. Maliketh, Queen Marika's loyal half-brother, bore a blade imbued with Destined Death, and there was not one demigod who did not fear him. Champion
nodes.lore: Beast's greaves made of black iron and decorated with gold. Worn by Maliketh the Black Blade. Maliketh, Queen Marika's loyal half-brother, bore a blade imbued with Destined Death, and there was not one demigod who did not fear him. Champions knew what was at stake. Indeed, that is what made them champions.

nodes.name: Mausoleum Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by headless soldiers who endlessly guard the Wandering Museum. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by headless soldiers who endlessly guard the Wandering Museum. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.

nodes.name: Mausoleum Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by headless knights who endlessly guard the Wandering Mausoleum. Time has yet to dull their luster.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by headless knights who endlessly guard the Wandering Mausoleum. Time has yet to dull their luster.

nodes.name: Old Sorcerer Legwraps
nodes.snippet: Ragged waistcloth that extends to the thighs. Common amongst old-fashioned sorcerers.
nodes.lore: Ragged waistcloth that extends to the thighs. Common amongst old-fashioned sorcerers.

nodes.name: Nox Monk Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by the monks of the Eternal City. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night sky, in eternal anticipation of their liege. Of the coming age of th
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by the monks of the Eternal City. Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night sky, in eternal anticipation of their liege. Of the coming age of the stars. And their Lord of Night.

nodes.name: Omenkiller Boots
nodes.snippet: Long, stiff leather gloves worn by the Omenkillers.
nodes.lore: Long, stiff leather gloves worn by the Omenkillers.

nodes.name: Nomadic Merchant's Trousers
nodes.snippet: Trousers of the nomadic merchants. These merchants once thrived as the Great Caravan, but after being accused of heretical beliefs, their entire clan was rounded up and buried alive far underground. Then, they chanted a curse of despair, an
nodes.lore: Trousers of the nomadic merchants. These merchants once thrived as the Great Caravan, but after being accused of heretical beliefs, their entire clan was rounded up and buried alive far underground. Then, they chanted a curse of despair, and summoned the flame of frenzy.

nodes.name: Page Trousers
nodes.snippet: Trousers worn by pages who serve nobility and are mindful to keep them out of harm's way.
nodes.lore: Trousers worn by pages who serve nobility and are mindful to keep them out of harm's way.

nodes.name: Night's Cavalry Greaves
nodes.snippet: Pitch-black greaves thinly painted with dried blood. Worn by the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds.
nodes.lore: Pitch-black greaves thinly painted with dried blood. Worn by the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds.

nodes.name: Mushroom Legs
nodes.snippet: Mushrooms found growing all over the body. These overgrown mushroom have colonized the Legs. To those enraptured by the scarlet rot, they are holy vestments that root one to the earth.
nodes.lore: Mushrooms found growing all over the body. These overgrown mushroom have colonized the Legs. To those enraptured by the scarlet rot, they are holy vestments that root one to the earth.

nodes.name: Omen Greaves
nodes.snippet: Malformed greaves resembling an Omen with its horns cut off.
nodes.lore: Malformed greaves resembling an Omen with its horns cut off.

nodes.name: Old Aristocrat Shoes
nodes.snippet: Hard-wearing shoes made of leather. Travel attire worn by nobles in the capital. Garb favored by the aged.
nodes.lore: Hard-wearing shoes made of leather. Travel attire worn by nobles in the capital. Garb favored by the aged.

nodes.name: Noble's Trousers
nodes.snippet: White trousers of superior craftsmanship. Worn by expatriated royalty. A gift of such rare beauty, a royal wouldn't disgrace their illustrious heritage even if found dead, in a ditch, in the middle of nowhere, while wearing such splendid ra
nodes.lore: White trousers of superior craftsmanship. Worn by expatriated royalty. A gift of such rare beauty, a royal wouldn't disgrace their illustrious heritage even if found dead, in a ditch, in the middle of nowhere, while wearing such splendid raiment.

nodes.name: Ragged Loincloth
nodes.snippet: Greaves pieced together from scavenged metal.
nodes.lore: Greaves pieced together from scavenged metal.

nodes.name: Perfumer Sarong
nodes.snippet: Sarong of an Erdtree Capital perfumer.
nodes.lore: Sarong of an Erdtree Capital perfumer.

nodes.name: Preceptor's Trousers
nodes.snippet: Trousers of the magic preceptors who serve the Carian royals. Black and perfectly discreet.
nodes.lore: Trousers of the magic preceptors who serve the Carian royals. Black and perfectly discreet.

nodes.name: Prophet Trousers
nodes.snippet: Trousers of the exiled prophets who foresaw that their faith would end in flames — and were persecuted and driven from their homes as a result. Its fabric scrapes against their skin like a file, and the rickety cart wheel around the neck wa
nodes.lore: Trousers of the exiled prophets who foresaw that their faith would end in flames — and were persecuted and driven from their homes as a result. Its fabric scrapes against their skin like a file, and the rickety cart wheel around the neck warns passers-by not to lend an ear to their meandering sermons.

nodes.name: Queen's Leggings
nodes.snippet: Leggings indicating the highest order of sorcerer. Worn by Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon. When Rennala, head of both the Academy of Raya Lucaria and the Carian royal family, lost her husband Radagon, her heart went along with him. And the
nodes.lore: Leggings indicating the highest order of sorcerer. Worn by Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon. When Rennala, head of both the Academy of Raya Lucaria and the Carian royal family, lost her husband Radagon, her heart went along with him. And then, those at the academy realized. That Rennala was no champion, after all.

nodes.name: Raya Lucarian Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by Raya Lucaria Academy soldiers. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by Raya Lucaria Academy soldiers. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.

nodes.name: Prisoner Trousers
nodes.snippet: Tattered trousers. Worn by a prisoner convicted of an appalling crime. Never once washed, every fiber is filthy. The smell is beyond belief.
nodes.lore: Tattered trousers. Worn by a prisoner convicted of an appalling crime. Never once washed, every fiber is filthy. The smell is beyond belief.

nodes.name: Redmane Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Black iron greaves worn by knights who fought by General Radahn's side. Time has yet to dull their luster.
nodes.lore: Black iron greaves worn by knights who fought by General Radahn's side. Time has yet to dull their luster.

nodes.name: Radahn's Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves depicting the golden lion. Worn by General Radahn.
nodes.lore: Greaves depicting the golden lion. Worn by General Radahn.

nodes.name: Radahn Soldier Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by soldiers who fought by General Radahn's side. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by soldiers who fought by General Radahn's side. Rust-worn and stained through unending conflict.

nodes.name: Royal Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Silver greaves of Loretta, a knight who served Miquella's Haligtree. Loretta, once a royal Carian knight, went on a journey in search of a haven for Albinaurics, and determined that the Haligtree was their best chance for eventual salvation
nodes.lore: Silver greaves of Loretta, a knight who served Miquella's Haligtree. Loretta, once a royal Carian knight, went on a journey in search of a haven for Albinaurics, and determined that the Haligtree was their best chance for eventual salvation.

nodes.name: Ronin's Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves of the man who calls himself Shabriri. Highly functional and heavily worn.
nodes.lore: Greaves of the man who calls himself Shabriri. Highly functional and heavily worn.

nodes.name: Royal Remains Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves graced with gold human bones. Worn by the unspeaking adherent of Sir Gideon the All-Knowing.
nodes.lore: Greaves graced with gold human bones. Worn by the unspeaking adherent of Sir Gideon the All-Knowing.

nodes.name: Sage Trousers
nodes.snippet: Thick burgundy trousers. Attire of the wise sages who were deemed heretical. Evidence that the wearer was driven from town.
nodes.lore: Thick burgundy trousers. Attire of the wise sages who were deemed heretical. Evidence that the wearer was driven from town.

nodes.name: Shaman Leggings
nodes.snippet: Leggings fashioned from bristly pelts. Worn by ancestral follower shamans.
nodes.lore: Leggings fashioned from bristly pelts. Worn by ancestral follower shamans.

nodes.name: Snow Witch Skirt
nodes.snippet: Witch's skirt in the color of snow. Once worn by the snowy crone who the young Ranni encountered deep in the woods. She was a witch, and well versed in cold sorceries. It is said that the doll that houses Ranni's soul was modeled after her.
nodes.lore: Witch's skirt in the color of snow. Once worn by the snowy crone who the young Ranni encountered deep in the woods. She was a witch, and well versed in cold sorceries. It is said that the doll that houses Ranni's soul was modeled after her. That old witch was Ranni's secret mentor.

nodes.name: Scaled Greaves
nodes.snippet: Gauntlets worn by Old Knight Istvan. The corroded metal is reinforced with rock-hard scales, making it high effective against non-physical attacks. Istvan is one of a few wizened Tarnished who survived to this day.
nodes.lore: Gauntlets worn by Old Knight Istvan. The corroded metal is reinforced with rock-hard scales, making it high effective against non-physical attacks. Istvan is one of a few wizened Tarnished who survived to this day.

nodes.name: Rotten Duelist Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves wrapped with bronze snakes, eaten through by scarlet rot. Worn by gladiators who were driven from the colosseum. The wearer becomes a slightly easier target for foes.
nodes.lore: Greaves wrapped with bronze snakes, eaten through by scarlet rot. Worn by gladiators who were driven from the colosseum. The wearer becomes a slightly easier target for foes.

nodes.name: Spellblade's Trousers
nodes.snippet: Glintstone sorcerer Rogier's traveling attire, graced with an intricate, aristocratic decoration. Strengthens glintstone sorcery skills.
nodes.lore: Glintstone sorcerer Rogier's traveling attire, graced with an intricate, aristocratic decoration. Strengthens glintstone sorcery skills.

nodes.name: Sorcerer Leggings
nodes.snippet: Leggings worn by Raya Lucaria's magic scholars. Made by wrapping a simple cloth around the legs.
nodes.lore: Leggings worn by Raya Lucaria's magic scholars. Made by wrapping a simple cloth around the legs.

nodes.name: Traveler's Slops
nodes.snippet: Slops of a traveling perfumer of no renown.
nodes.lore: Slops of a traveling perfumer of no renown.

nodes.name: Veteran's Greaves
nodes.snippet: An old greaves that has seen many battles.Worn by Niall, the great veteran general of Sol.
nodes.lore: An old greaves that has seen many battles.Worn by Niall, the great veteran general of Sol.

nodes.name: Traveler's Boots
nodes.snippet: Light yet sturdy leather boots.
nodes.lore: Light yet sturdy leather boots.

nodes.name: Traveling Maiden Boots
nodes.snippet: Boots worn by traveling maidens.
nodes.lore: Boots worn by traveling maidens.

nodes.name: Twinned Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves depicting entwined twins of gold and silver.
nodes.lore: Greaves depicting entwined twins of gold and silver.

nodes.name: Tree Sentinel Greaves
nodes.snippet: Golden greaves of the heavy cavalry Tree Sentinels who serve the Erdtree.
nodes.lore: Golden greaves of the heavy cavalry Tree Sentinels who serve the Erdtree.

nodes.name: War Surgeon Trousers
nodes.snippet: Bloodstained trousers of the war surgeons who were effectively mercy killers. Of the surgeons that were abducted by the Lord of Blood none were able to tame the accursed blood. None but Varré, that is; though he was an exception
nodes.lore: Bloodstained trousers of the war surgeons who were effectively mercy killers. Of the surgeons that were abducted by the Lord of Blood none were able to tame the accursed blood. None but Varré, that is; though he was an exception

nodes.name: Vulgar Militia Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves worn by lean, mean, and filthy militiamen.
nodes.lore: Greaves worn by lean, mean, and filthy militiamen.

nodes.name: Warrior Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves of a nomadic warrior. Crafted from sturdy leather.
nodes.lore: Greaves of a nomadic warrior. Crafted from sturdy leather.

nodes.name: Vagabond Knight Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves of a knight banished from their motherland. Dirty and battered after enduring a lengthy vagabond journey.
nodes.lore: Greaves of a knight banished from their motherland. Dirty and battered after enduring a lengthy vagabond journey.

nodes.name: White Reed Greaves
nodes.snippet: Greaves of the White Reeds, fashioned from banded iron plates. Worn by the Inabam head disciples of the great swordsman Okina. The Inaba traveled in pursuit of not only the master who abandoned them, but also proper deaths, won honorably th
nodes.lore: Greaves of the White Reeds, fashioned from banded iron plates. Worn by the Inabam head disciples of the great swordsman Okina. The Inaba traveled in pursuit of not only the master who abandoned them, but also proper deaths, won honorably through hard-fought combat. To be a White Reed is to seek death; fitting for the Inaba, who desired nothingmore than to die by the sword.

nodes.name: Zamor Legwraps
nodes.snippet: Legwraps worn by knights of Zamor, hailed as heroes in the War against the Giants. These long-lived warriors, clad in biting, freezing winds, are said to have been the mortal enemies of the Fire Giants since time immemorial.
nodes.lore: Legwraps worn by knights of Zamor, hailed as heroes in the War against the Giants. These long-lived warriors, clad in biting, freezing winds, are said to have been the mortal enemies of the Fire Giants since time immemorial.

nodes.name: Blue Cipher Ring
nodes.snippet: Item for online play. Puts the wearer in ready state to answer should someone in another world call for rescue. You will be summoned to their world as a hunter. When summoned to rescue another player, your objective will be to defeat the in
nodes.lore: Item for online play. Puts the wearer in ready state to answer should someone in another world call for rescue. You will be summoned to their world as a hunter. When summoned to rescue another player, your objective will be to defeat the invader. Enables the wearer to answer calls for rescue

nodes.name: White Cipher Ring
nodes.snippet: Item for online play. Allows you to automatically request for a hunter from another world to come to your rescue when your world is invaded. (You may be unable to summon rescuers under certain circumstances). A lost mystic code, enchanted t
nodes.lore: Item for online play. Allows you to automatically request for a hunter from another world to come to your rescue when your world is invaded. (You may be unable to summon rescuers under certain circumstances). A lost mystic code, enchanted to take the form of a ring. One of the fetishes said to have been bestowed by the Two Fingers. When invaded, request the aid of a hunter.

nodes.name: Furlcalling Finger Remedy
nodes.snippet: Item for online play. Craftable item. Reveals cooperative and competitive multiplayer signs. Co-op summoning signs will be shown in gold, while hostile summoning signs will be shown in red. Multiplayer begins when you summon a player from a
nodes.lore: Item for online play. Craftable item. Reveals cooperative and competitive multiplayer signs. Co-op summoning signs will be shown in gold, while hostile summoning signs will be shown in red. Multiplayer begins when you summon a player from another world through their sign. Reveals co-op and hostile summoning signs

nodes.name: Tarnished's Furled Finger
nodes.snippet: Item for online play. Creates a summon sign for cooperative multiplayer. Your objective will be to defeat the area boss of the world to which you were summoned. A finger of corpse wax, furled like a hook. It is a relic of those who came bef
nodes.lore: Item for online play. Creates a summon sign for cooperative multiplayer. Your objective will be to defeat the area boss of the world to which you were summoned. A finger of corpse wax, furled like a hook. It is a relic of those who came before, left to help those who would come after. Creates cooperative multiplayer summon sign.

nodes.name: Finger Severer
nodes.snippet: Item for online play. Sends another, or oneself, home.
nodes.lore: Item for online play. Sends another, or oneself, home.

nodes.name: Duelist's Furled Finger
nodes.snippet: Item for online play. Creates a summon sign for competitive multiplayer. Your objective will be to defeat the Host of Fingers of the world to which you were summoned. A finger of corpse wax, furled like a hook. The bronze adornments are the
nodes.lore: Item for online play. Creates a summon sign for competitive multiplayer. Your objective will be to defeat the Host of Fingers of the world to which you were summoned. A finger of corpse wax, furled like a hook. The bronze adornments are the mark of a duelist. Creates competitive multiplayer summon sign.

nodes.name: Memory Of Grace
nodes.snippet: A phantom vision of the first grace, which once guided the Tarnished to the Lands Between. Lose all runes and return to last site of grace at which you rested. It all repeats. Be seen by the Elden Ring. Become the Elden Lord. Lose all runes
nodes.lore: A phantom vision of the first grace, which once guided the Tarnished to the Lands Between. Lose all runes and return to last site of grace at which you rested. It all repeats. Be seen by the Elden Ring. Become the Elden Lord. Lose all runes, return to last site of lost grace.

nodes.name: Tarnished's Wizened Finger
nodes.snippet: Item for online play. (Can also be used from the Messages menu.) Use to write messages. Your messages will be conveyed to other worlds, allowing other players to read them. A finger of corpse wax, so emaciated the bone is visible. It is a r
nodes.lore: Item for online play. (Can also be used from the Messages menu.) Use to write messages. Your messages will be conveyed to other worlds, allowing other players to read them. A finger of corpse wax, so emaciated the bone is visible. It is a relic of those who came before, left to help those who would come after. Used to write messages.

nodes.name: Taunter's Tongue
nodes.snippet: Item for online play. Lures in invaders. This allows your world to be invaded without any Furled Finger cooperators present, and it also shortens the interval between windows of opportunity for invasion. Additionally, enables the arrival of
nodes.lore: Item for online play. Lures in invaders. This allows your world to be invaded without any Furled Finger cooperators present, and it also shortens the interval between windows of opportunity for invasion. Additionally, enables the arrival of a second invader. (When two invaders are present, you will be limited to one cooperator.) Lures in invanders.

nodes.name: Bloody Finger
nodes.snippet: Item for online play. Attempts an invasion of another player's world. If successful, your objective will be to defeat the Host of Fingers of the world to which you were summoned. The nail of this finger is shot through with streaks of fresh
nodes.lore: Item for online play. Attempts an invasion of another player's world. If successful, your objective will be to defeat the Host of Fingers of the world to which you were summoned. The nail of this finger is shot through with streaks of fresh, glistening blood. The finger's sickly pale skin feels nothing now, but the nail still aches with sweetest pain. Attempts invasion of other player's world.

nodes.name: Small Golden Effigy
nodes.snippet: Online multiplayer item. Sends a summon sign for cooperative multiplayer to a nearby summoning pool. In cooperative multiplayer, you will be summoned to another world to help defeat the area boss. Send co-operative sign to summoning pool
nodes.lore: Online multiplayer item. Sends a summon sign for cooperative multiplayer to a nearby summoning pool. In cooperative multiplayer, you will be summoned to another world to help defeat the area boss. Send co-operative sign to summoning pool

nodes.name: Small Red Effigy
nodes.snippet: Item for online play. Sends a competitive sign to a nearby summoning pool. In competitive multiplayer, your objective will be to defeat the Host of Fingers of the world to which you were summoned. Sends competitive sign to summoning pool
nodes.lore: Item for online play. Sends a competitive sign to a nearby summoning pool. In competitive multiplayer, your objective will be to defeat the Host of Fingers of the world to which you were summoned. Sends competitive sign to summoning pool

nodes.lore: White flower that blooms in catacombs. Each a soundless bell used to summon spirits. Strengthens ashes to +2. Spirit tuning is not merely the simple act of imbuing strength. It is an art that lies somewhere between tuning an instrument and conducting a conversation, leaving both parties enriched. Strengthen ashes to +2.

nodes.snippet: A sacred flask modelled after a golden holy chalice that was once graced by a tear of life. Filled with crimson tears, this flask restores HP with use. Rest at a site of grace to replenish. It is said that a Finger Maiden will bestow two su

nodes.lore: Polished Ruin Fragment that shines brighter than a Rainbow Stone. Craftable item. Emits light from the location it is placed, illuminating surroundings. However, the effect is short-lived, and it lacks the diverse colors of rainbow stones. May serve some benefit in dark places, or at night. Emits a faint light from the location it is placed

nodes.name: Pauper's Rune

nodes.name: Flask Of Wondrous Physick
nodes.snippet: A relic of the physick chemists, priests of the Erdtree. Harnesses the powers of crystal tears, which only form after the passage of many moons. Various specials effects are bestowed upon the drinker, dependent on the specific mixture of cr
nodes.lore: A relic of the physick chemists, priests of the Erdtree. Harnesses the powers of crystal tears, which only form after the passage of many moons. Various specials effects are bestowed upon the drinker, dependent on the specific mixture of crystal tears. Rest at a site of grace to replenish. It is said that in the Lands Between, pools of crystal tears amass at the bases of Minor Erdtrees. Bestows various special effects

nodes.name: Sleep Pot

nodes.name: Gold-pickled Fowl Foot

nodes.name: Dragon Heart
nodes.snippet: Dragon heart seized by a dragon tracker. It has a bizarre shape, mottled by gravel, and it continues to beat vivaciously. An offering used in the Dragon Communion. Consume a dragon's heart at the altar to make its power yours. While a terri
nodes.lore: Dragon heart seized by a dragon tracker. It has a bizarre shape, mottled by gravel, and it continues to beat vivaciously. An offering used in the Dragon Communion. Consume a dragon's heart at the altar to make its power yours. While a terrible and savage-looking thing, the heart has a peculiar beauty to it. Gain power of the dragon at the Dragon Communion altar.

nodes.name: Stimulating Boluses
nodes.snippet: Light-purple boluses made from cave moss. Craftable item. Alleviates buildup of sleep. Sleep accumulates gradually, causing sudden fogginess and loss of FP once the threshold is reached, even if it does not force the afflicted into true slu
nodes.lore: Light-purple boluses made from cave moss. Craftable item. Alleviates buildup of sleep. Sleep accumulates gradually, causing sudden fogginess and loss of FP once the threshold is reached, even if it does not force the afflicted into true slumber. Take one of these into timely fashion to avoid such events. Alleviates buildup of sleep

nodes.lore: Item for online play. Craftable item. Reveals cooperative and competitive multiplayer signs. Reveals co-op and hostile summoning signs

nodes.lore: Craftable item prepared using a cracked pot. A cocktail of effluents is sealed inside, and a short rope that aids throwing has been secured around the pot. Throw at rearward enemies to cause buildup of deadly poison. Beware though; those who carry these pots will slowly accumulate poison in their own bodies. Push someone in a privy; expect to get dung on your hands. Throw behind to cause buildup of deadly poison

nodes.lore: Forbidden art of depraved perfumers. Craftable with a perfume bottle. Uses FP to release a poison mist from user's mouth, causing a buildup of poison. Perfumed powder is held in the mouth to dissolve before being expelled. It was once a restorative art, or so it is said. Uses FP to release poison mist from the mouth.

nodes.lore: A fetish bathed in golden magic. Shackles were used to bind the accursed people called the Omen, and these ones were made to keep a particular Omen under strictest confinement. Though faint, the shackles still retain vestiges of power — enough to trap the once-bound Margit on earth, if only for a short time. Binds Margit and Morgott two times per battle

nodes.snippet: An of the perfumers who fought in the Shattering. Craftable with a perfume bottle. Uses FP to raise the attack power of the user and nearby allies while also reducing the damage from one incoming attack by half. This aromatic has an extreme
nodes.lore: An of the perfumers who fought in the Shattering. Craftable with a perfume bottle. Uses FP to raise the attack power of the user and nearby allies while also reducing the damage from one incoming attack by half. This aromatic has an extremely potent morale-raising effect that makes those accustomed to it fearless in the face of death. It was this influence that made the perfumers exceptional commanders. Boosts ally attack power and reduces incoming damage once.

nodes.name: Remembrance Of The Omen King
nodes.snippet: Remembrance of Morgott, the Omen King, hewn into the Erdtree. The power of its namesake can be unlocked by the Finger Reader. Alternatively, it can be used to gain a great bounty of runes. Though born one of the graceless Omen, Morgott took
nodes.lore: Remembrance of Morgott, the Omen King, hewn into the Erdtree. The power of its namesake can be unlocked by the Finger Reader. Alternatively, it can be used to gain a great bounty of runes. Though born one of the graceless Omen, Morgott took it upon himself to become the Erdtree's protector. He loved not in return, for he was never loved, but nevertheless, love it he did. Take the power of its namesake via Finger Reader

nodes.name: Remembrance Of The Black Blade
nodes.snippet: Remembrance of Maliketh, the Black Blade, hewn into the Erdtree. The power of its namesake can be unlocked by the Finger Reader. Alternatively, it can be used to gain a great bounty of runes. Maliketh was a shadowbound beast given to his Em
nodes.lore: Remembrance of Maliketh, the Black Blade, hewn into the Erdtree. The power of its namesake can be unlocked by the Finger Reader. Alternatively, it can be used to gain a great bounty of runes. Maliketh was a shadowbound beast given to his Empyrean. Marika's sole need of her shadow was a vessel to lock away Destined Death. Even then, she betrayed him. Take the power of its namesake Via Finger Reader

nodes.lore: Protection of a hidden temple in the guise of a bedchamber. This blessing is of the utmost rarity. Uses FP to temporarily raise poise. The effect lasts longer than a mere favor. It's said a deathbed companion will only produce a blessing of this kind for a champion but once in her entire life. The sole blessing which she imbues of her own volition. Uses FP to temporarily raise poise

nodes.lore: Astrology tool used by members of the Carian royal family. Part of a larger instrument, removed and stolen away. Allows the viewer to better see faraway things. During the age of the Erdtree, Carian astrology withered on the vine. The fate once writ in the night skies had been fettered by the Golden Order. Allows viewer to see faraway things

nodes.lore: A delicate goldwork ring. Can be used as a finger whistle. Sound the whistle to summon and ride spectral steed. (Dismounts steed when used while on horseback.) Upon death, the spectral steed can be summoned again, but doing so consumes the Flask of Crimson Tears. Summon and ride spectral steed Torrent.

nodes.lore: Dragon heart seized by a dragon tracker. It has a bizarre shape, mottled by gravel, and it continues to beat vivaciously. An offering used in the Dragon Communion. Consume a dragon's heart at the altar to make its power yours. While a terrible and savage-looking thing, the heart has a peculiar beauty to it. Gain power of the dragon at the Dragon Communion altar.

nodes.snippet: Now, Queen Marika the Eternal is nowhere to be found, and in the Night of the Black Knives Godwyn the Golden was first to perish. Soon, Marika's offspring, demigods all, claimed the shards of the Elden Ring. The mad taint of their newfound
nodes.lore: Now, Queen Marika the Eternal is nowhere to be found, and in the Night of the Black Knives Godwyn the Golden was first to perish. Soon, Marika's offspring, demigods all, claimed the shards of the Elden Ring. The mad taint of their newfound strength triggered the Shattering. Ruler of The Lands Between

nodes.name: Radagon Of The Golden Order
nodes.snippet: Lord Radagon was a great champion, possessed of flowing red locks. He came to these lands at the head of a great golden host, when he met Lady Rennala in battle. He soon repented his territorial transgressions though, and became husband to
nodes.lore: Lord Radagon was a great champion, possessed of flowing red locks. He came to these lands at the head of a great golden host, when he met Lady Rennala in battle. He soon repented his territorial transgressions though, and became husband to the Carian Queen. However. When Godfrey, first Elden Lord, was hounded from the Lands Between, Radagon left Rennala to return to the Erdtree Capital, becoming Queen Marika's second husband and King Consort. Taking the title... of second Elden Lord.

nodes.snippet: Fierce guardian and protector of its master, even when it has long left.
nodes.lore: Fierce guardian and protector of its master, even when it has long left.

nodes.lore: A ferocious red wolf with large fangs and blistering speed.

nodes.lore: General Radahn is cursed ever to wander. Eaten from the inside, by Malenia's scarlet rot, his Wits are long gone. Now he gathers the corpses of former friends and foes alike, gorging on them, like a dog.

nodes.name: Tibia Mariner
nodes.snippet: Tibia Mariner is a spectral sailor capable of calling forth the aid of undead Skeleton creatures and is mainly found at northeast Summonwater Village in Limgrave, near the limits with Caelir. This is an optional boss as players must not def
nodes.lore: Tibia Mariner is a spectral sailor capable of calling forth the aid of undead Skeleton creatures and is mainly found at northeast Summonwater Village in Limgrave, near the limits with Caelir. This is an optional boss as players must not defeat it in order to advance to the Legacy Dungeon.
